vocabulary.definition: v. <诗>与…为友（friend的现在分词形式）
vocabulary.context: It's possible that friending their parents makes teens behave better.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与父母交朋友可能会让青少年表现得更好

vocabulary.definition: adj. 深入的, 彻底的
vocabulary.context: Or perhaps social media gave parents a more in-depth look at their children's lives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者也许社交媒体让父母更深入地了解孩子的生活

vocabulary.definition: n. 林荫路
vocabulary.context: Teens used to head to malls, movie theaters or parks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 青少年过去常常去购物中心、电影院或公园

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 删除；[计] 删除
vocabulary.context: Even posts you delete aren't always gone for good.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 即使您删除的帖子也并不总是永远消失

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 用大字体书写, 独占(市场), 使全神贯注；[法] 正式誊写, 以大字写, 囤积
vocabulary.context: But being glued to your phone or engrossed in a Snapchat story isn't all bad.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但沉迷于手机或全神贯注于 Snapchat 故事并不全是坏事

vocabulary.definition: n. 动力学；[化] 动力学
vocabulary.context: Such online relationships can actually improve family dynamics at home, she observes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她观察到，这种在线关系实际上可以改善家里的家庭动态

vocabulary.definition: n. 作恶者, 犯罪者, 行凶者；[法] 作恶者, 行凶者, 犯罪者
vocabulary.context: Bullying creates victims and perpetrators.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 欺凌行为会造成受害者和施暴者

vocabulary.definition: n. 卷轴, 一卷, 纺车, 旋转, 蹒跚；v.t. 卷...于轴上, 绕, 使旋转；v.i. 蹒跚地走, 旋转, 眩晕, 摇晃, 退缩；[计] 卷; 盘
vocabulary.context: Teens compare their own messy lives to the highlight reels that their peers present.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 青少年将自己凌乱的生活与同龄人呈现的精彩片段进行比较

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不感兴趣的, 无利害关系的
vocabulary.context: He fingered the topmost comic of the stack, but seemed uninterested in the colorful squares of fast-paced action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用手指抚摸着漫画堆最上面的一本，但似乎对快节奏动作的彩色方块不感兴趣

vocabulary.definition: n. 突然, 唐突
vocabulary.context: "Nobody knows," his father snapped, then immediately regretted his abruptness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "没人知道，"他父亲厉声说道，然后立即为自己的唐突感到后悔

vocabulary.definition: n. 湿
vocabulary.context: He wanted the day to be happy, and the moistness of his mother's eyes, the scowl on his father's face, spoiled the mood of fluttering expectation with which he had greeted the morning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他希望这一天是快乐的，而母亲眼眶湿润，父亲脸上愁容满面，破坏了他迎接早晨的激动期待的心情

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未剪(短)的
vocabulary.context: He unclipped a penlike object from the pocket of his tunic and flashed a tiny light into the boy's eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他从外衣口袋里取出一支笔状的物体，向男孩的眼睛里闪过一道微弱的光

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有柱的, 成柱状的
vocabulary.context: They crossed the marble floors of the great pillared lobby, passed beneath an archway and entered an automatic lift that brought them to the fourth floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们穿过大厅的大理石地板，穿过拱门下方，进入自动电梯，将他们带到四楼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有饰缎带的
vocabulary.context: Somewhere in the little apartment there were wrapped, beribboned packages waiting to be opened, and in the tiny wall-kitchen something warm and sweet was being prepared in the automatic stove.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在小公寓的某个地方，有一些缠着丝带的包裹等待着打开，小壁式厨房里的自动炉子里正在准备一些温暖而甜蜜的东西

vocabulary.definition: adj. 最高的, 顶端的
vocabulary.context: He fingered the topmost comic of the stack, but seemed uninterested in the colorful squares of fast-paced action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用手指抚摸着漫画堆最上面的一本，但似乎对快节奏动作的彩色方块不感兴趣

vocabulary.definition: n. 恼怒, 烦恼, 令人恼火的事情；[法] 招人烦恼的事物, 烦恼, 苦闷
vocabulary.context: His father, now slumped into an armchair with the Government newspaper rattled the sheets in vexation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的父亲现在瘫坐在扶手椅上，政府报纸恼怒地把床单弄得格格作响

vocabulary.definition: n. 商, 份额；[计] 商
vocabulary.context: We regret to inform you that his intelligence quotient is above the Government regulation, according to Rule 84 Section 5 of the New Code."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们遗憾地通知您，根据新法典第 84 条第 5 条，他的智商高于政府规定。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 象男人的, 强壮的, 适于男人的
vocabulary.context: "Well, Dickie," he said, with a manly frown, "you've got an appointment today."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好吧，迪基，"他带着男子气概的皱眉说道，"你今天有个约会。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 赌金保管者；[法] 赌款保存人, 保存保证金的人
vocabulary.context: Sherman was part of a task force comprised of other educators, parents and stakeholders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 谢尔曼是由其他教育工作者、家长和利益相关者组成的工作组的成员

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不安的, 不沉着的, 烦燥的, 难以取悦的
vocabulary.context: "They were less fidgety in class, and there were less behavioral issues in class."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他们在课堂上不再那么烦躁，课堂上的行为问题也更少。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无特定结构的, 非系统组成的
vocabulary.context: Together they researched the benefits of unstructured learning time in different age groups.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们一起研究了不同年龄段非结构化学习时间的好处

vocabulary.definition: n. 健康
vocabulary.context: Four years ago, Medway Public Schools hired Ryan Sherman as the town's first Director of Wellness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 四年前，梅德韦公立学校聘请瑞安·谢尔曼（Ryan Sherman）担任该镇的首任健康总监

vocabulary.definition: adj. 幽闭的, 被压抑的, 被禁锢的
vocabulary.context: They learned that younger students thrive in the classroom after they expel pent-up energy during recess.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们了解到，年龄较小的学生在课间休息时释放压抑的能量后，可以在课堂上茁壮成长

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有知识的, 进步的, 文明的
vocabulary.context: It's time for recess at Medway Middle School for the first time after town officials became enlightened about the benefits of play, the MetroWest Daily News reported.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据《MetroWest Daily News》报道，在镇官员认识到玩耍的好处之后，梅德韦中学第一次放假了

vocabulary.definition: n. 代数学
vocabulary.context: Social-emotional learning, said Sherman, isn't a class in and of itself, but more of a moral skill-set embedded into every lesson from Algebra to Shakespeare.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 谢尔曼说，社会情感学习本身并不是一门课程，而是一种道德技能，嵌入从代数到莎士比亚的每一课中

vocabulary.definition: n. 移情作用, 共鸣；[医] 移情, 神入
vocabulary.context: The idea is to integrate personal feelings, empathy, and understanding into every lesson.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个想法是将个人感受、同理心和理解融入到每一堂课中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有益的, 受益的；[经] 有使用权的, 可享利益的
vocabulary.context: The session, said Superintendent Armand Pires, is not only beneficial to release energy, but also fits the district's social-emotional learning agenda.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学区总监 Armand Pires 表示，此次活动不仅有利于释放能量，而且符合学区的社交情感学习议程

vocabulary.definition: n. 口琴, 玻璃钟琴；[医] 氢气发音管
vocabulary.context: He revealed some yellowed newspaper clippings and a battered harmonica.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他展示了一些泛黄的剪报和一把破旧的口琴

vocabulary.definition: n. (报纸)写标题的记者
vocabulary.context: One of the clippings said he had been the hit of the show, although not the headliner.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其中一份剪报称他是该剧的热门人物，尽管不是头条新闻

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有点小的, 短小的
vocabulary.context: His black, heavily wrinkled face was surrounded by a halo of crinkly white hair and whiskers that seemed to separate his head from the layers of dirty coats piled on his smallish frame.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他那张黑色的、布满皱纹的脸被一圈卷曲的白发和胡须所包围，这些白发和胡须似乎将他的头与瘦小身躯上堆积的脏外套分开

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自以为是的；自大的
vocabulary.context: "For a big-headed boy you sure do ask the foolishest questions."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "对于一个大头孩子来说，你确实会问最愚蠢的问题。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. （因阴森怪诞而）引起恐惧的, 可怕的( eerie的比较级 )
vocabulary.context: Maybe, the thought came to Greg, the scene could be even eerier.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 格雷格突然想到，也许场景会更加诡异

vocabulary.definition: adj. 半流质的, 冲淡了的
vocabulary.context: If you know your pappy did something, you know you can do something too.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你知道你的爸爸做了某事，你就知道你也能做某事

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有点方的
vocabulary.context: There was a room a few feet from the door, and from where he stood in the entrance, Greg could see a squarish patch of light on the floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 距离门几英尺的地方有一个房间，格雷格站在入口处，可以看到地板上有一块方形的光斑

vocabulary.definition: n. （车辆的）后灯，尾灯( taillight的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: A car passed, its tires hissing over the wet street and its red taillights glowing in the darkness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一辆汽车驶过，轮胎在潮湿的街道上发出嘶嘶声，红色尾灯在黑暗中闪闪发光

vocabulary.definition: n. 即席演出, 即兴曲；adj. 即席的；adv. 即席
vocabulary.context: Some of the guys had held an impromptu checker tournament there the week before, and Greg had noticed that the door, once boarded over, had been slightly ajar.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一周前，一些人在那里举行了一场即兴跳棋锦标赛，格雷格注意到，一旦登上门，门就微开着

vocabulary.definition: adj. 友善的, 好交际的
vocabulary.context: They sat there for a while in companionable silence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在友好的沉默中坐了一会儿

vocabulary.definition: adj. 后补的, 二流的
vocabulary.context: One each against Lee Elm, his team's second-string goalie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与球队的二线守门员李·埃尔姆（Lee Elm）各一场

vocabulary.definition: n. 机动三轮车, 带边车的摩托车
vocabulary.context: "Wish I could have been at the game today rather than that council meeting," his grandfather finally said, looking out the open window to their right, where one of the Jemison boys was trying to start his stubborn three-wheeler.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "希望我今天能参加比赛，而不是参加议会会议，"他的祖父最后说道，他看着右边开着的窗户，其中一个杰米森男孩正在试图启动他那顽固的三轮车

vocabulary.definition: n. 播放列表；演出剧目表
vocabulary.context: How it sounded on the playlist on Oren's own iPhone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Oren 自己的 iPhone 上的播放列表中的声音如何

vocabulary.definition: v. 践踏，跺脚( tromp的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: The wind had been knocked out of him like a piece of Bubble Wrap tromped on by a boot.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 风从他身上吹走了，就像一块泡沫包装纸被靴子踩到了一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 大锤, 极有分量的事物；adj. 强力的, 手下不留情的；v. 用大锤打, 沉重打击
vocabulary.context: Right now it felt heavy as a sledgehammer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在感觉它像一把大锤一样沉重

vocabulary.definition: n. 大梁, 主梁；[化] 撑杆
vocabulary.context: A third kid, whose hair was cut so short it looked like a newly mowed lawn, reached out to pluck one of the heavy braided-steel cables strung between the iron girders that served as posts for the fence around the field.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第三个孩子的头发被剪得很短，看起来就像刚修剪过的草坪，他伸手去拉一根挂在铁梁之间的沉重的编织钢缆，这些铁梁是田野周围围栏的柱子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 谷类的, 乡巴佬似的, 粗野的；[建] 角制的, 角(质)的
vocabulary.context: It was sort of a corny song, but it usually inspired him way more than Jay-Z's latest rap.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一首老生常谈的歌曲，但它通常比 Jay-Z 的最新说唱给他带来更多启发

vocabulary.definition: n. 干辣椒, 辣椒粉
vocabulary.context: So usual that the waitress - one of the teenage Thompson twins who looked so alike Oren could never tell them apart - brought out the plate of fry bread, two bowls of buffalo chili, and two glasses of water without their having to order.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如此平常，女服务员--汤普森双胞胎中的一个，他们看起来如此相似，奥伦永远无法区分他们--端出一盘炸面包、两碗水牛辣椒和两杯水，无需他们点餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 反射, 反射光, 映像；adj. 反射的, 折转的；v.t. 使折转, 使折回
vocabulary.context: You have good reflexes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你的反应能力很好

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人寿保险的；[医] 人寿保险
vocabulary.context: As she hung up, she remembered Arthur's life-insurance policy for $25,000, with double indemnity for -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她挂断电话时，她想起亚瑟的人寿保险保单金额为 25,000 美元，其中包括 -

vocabulary.definition: n. 小鸡, 适合于烤焙的小鸡, 烤肉师傅, 烤焙用具, 大热天
vocabulary.context: After she put the lamb chops in the broiler, she sat down to open the package.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她把羊排放入烤炉后，她坐下来打开包装

vocabulary.definition: adv. 失去知觉, 麻木
vocabulary.context: She struggled to her feet and walked into the kitchen numbly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她挣扎着站起来，麻木地走进厨房

vocabulary.definition: n. 肉片, 炸肉片, 炸肉排
vocabulary.context: After a while, she went back into the kitchen to turn the cutlets in the broiler.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 过了一会儿，她回到厨房，把肉片放入烤炉里翻动

vocabulary.definition: n. 喧闹, 激怒, 感动, 狂热；[医] 狂乱, 狂暴, 狂怒
vocabulary.context: All this furor over a meaningless button.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有这些愤怒都是为了一个毫无意义的按钮

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在货币问题上, 从金钱角度, 财政上
vocabulary.context: " Monetarily? " she challenged.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "金钱上的？"她挑战道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 按钮操作的
vocabulary.context: Inside the carton was a push-button unit fastened to a small wooden box.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纸箱内有一个按钮装置，固定在一个小木箱上

vocabulary.definition: n. 赔偿, 保障, 补偿, 赦免, 保护；[经] 赔偿, 补偿, 赔偿金
vocabulary.context: As she hung up, she remembered Arthur's life-insurance policy for $25,000, with double indemnity for -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她挂断电话时，她想起亚瑟的人寿保险保单金额为 25,000 美元，其中包括 -

vocabulary.definition: adj. 怀疑的, 不轻信的
vocabulary.context: "All right, suppose it is?" He looked incredulous.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好吧，假设是这样？"他看上去难以置信

vocabulary.definition: adj. 分发的, 分配的, 分布的；n. 分配词
vocabulary.context: by using the distributive law." Would the class never end?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过使用分配律。"课程永远不会结束吗？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 缺乏幽默感的, 非常严肃的, 一本正经的
vocabulary.context: There was a ripple of dry, humorless laughter - almost, Laura thought, like the sound of a rattlesnake.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一阵干涩、毫无幽默感的笑声响起--劳拉想，几乎就像响尾蛇的声音

vocabulary.definition: adj. 块状的, 笨重的, 不中用的
vocabulary.context: What a lumpish, awkward creature Rachel was.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雷切尔是一个多么笨拙、笨拙的人啊

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未被接纳的, 被拒绝的,不承担的
vocabulary.context: None of them knew what it was like to be unwanted, unaccepted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们都不知道不受欢迎、不被接受是什么感觉

vocabulary.definition: n. 马德拉斯薄棉布
vocabulary.context: ...the hall, streamed in and out of doors, clustered under red and yellow posters advertising the latest dance. Mohair sweaters, madras shirts, pea-green raincoats. They were all alike, all the same. And in the center of the group, as usual, Diane Goddard was saying, "It'll be a riot! I just can't wait to see her face when she finds out."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...大厅里人流涌入，门外挤满了最新舞蹈广告的红色和黄色海报。马海毛毛衣、马德拉斯衬衫、豌豆绿雨衣。他们都很相似，都一样。和往常一样，黛安·戈达德在人群中央说道："这将是一场骚乱！我迫不及待地想看到她发现后的表情。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不整洁地; 不修边幅地; 凌乱地; 无条理地
vocabulary.context: Her socks had fallen untidily around her heavy ankles, and her slip showed a raggedy edge of lace.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的袜子杂乱地落在她沉重的脚踝上，她的裙子上露出了破旧的蕾丝边

vocabulary.definition: adj. 俗丽的, 华而不实的；n. 盛大宴会
vocabulary.context: The gaudy flowers of Rachel Horton's blouse stood out among the fluffy sweaters and pleated skirts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Rachel Horton 衬衫上艳丽的花朵在蓬松的毛衣和百褶裙中脱颖而出

vocabulary.definition: n. 遮篷, 雨篷
vocabulary.context: Laura thought of the narrow, dirty street and the tattered awning in front of the tailor shop.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 劳拉想起了那条狭窄肮脏的街道和裁缝店前破烂的遮阳篷

vocabulary.definition: n. 土块；v.t. 对...掷土块
vocabulary.context: They were clods, the whole lot of them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们全都是土块

vocabulary.definition: n. 统计员, 统计学家；[经] 统计家
vocabulary.context: David Spiegelhalter is a statistician at the University of Cambridge in England and author of the book The Art of Statistics .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: David Spiegelhalter 是英国剑桥大学的统计学家，也是《统计的艺术》一书的作者

vocabulary.definition: n. 百慕大岛
vocabulary.context: Two decades later, an article about their disappearance introduced the idea of the Bermuda Triangle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 二十年后，一篇关于他们失踪的文章介绍了百慕大三角的想法

vocabulary.definition: adj. 三角形的, 三人间的；[医] 三角的, 三角形的
vocabulary.context: This triangular area of ocean is roughly the same size as Alaska, and connects points at Bermuda, Puerto Rico, and Miami, Florida.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个三角形海洋区域的大小与阿拉斯加大致相同，连接百慕大、波多黎各和佛罗里达州迈阿密

vocabulary.definition: n. 航线, 航线的设备, 航空公司
vocabulary.context: Major airlines and shipping companies travel regularly through the Bermuda Triangle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主要航空公司和航运公司定期穿越百慕大三角

vocabulary.definition: n. 频率, 频数；[计] 频率
vocabulary.context: Sure enough, the US National Ocean Service says, "There is no evidence that mysterious disappearances occur with any greater frequency in the Bermuda Triangle than in any other large, well-traveled area of the ocean."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 果然，美国国家海洋局表示，"没有证据表明百慕大三角发生神秘失踪的频率高于任何其他大型、交通繁忙的海洋区域。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 看不见, 失踪, 消失

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她说，海豚大脑中负责抽象思维的大脑新皮质"比我们的大脑更加复杂"，她认为海豚能够进行复杂、微妙的思维

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 报道称，二十四只海豚在服役多年后将被"重新分配"，以便海上无人机或无人水下航行器（海军用语为 UUV）可以取代它们

vocabulary.definition: adj. 中年的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想起著名的《纽约客》漫画，画中两只海豚并肩游泳，其中一只对另一只海豚说："如果我在死前只能做一件事，那就是和一对来自康涅狄格州的中年夫妇一起游泳。" （你可以在这里看到。）

vocabulary.definition: adv. 脚先着地, 死

vocabulary.definition: n. 宁静
vocabulary.context: I see the world gradually being turned into a wilderness, and I hear every approaching thunder, which will destroy us too, I can feel the suffering of millions and yet, if I look up into the heavens, I think it will all come right, and that this cruelty too will end, and that peace and tranquility will return again.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我看到世界逐渐变成一片荒野，我听到每一声临近的雷声，它们也会毁灭我们，我能感受到数百万人的痛苦，但如果我仰望天空，我想一切都会好起来的，这种残酷也将结束，和平与安宁将再次回归

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哦，我必须承认，它们看起来很真实--你客厅里的非洲--但它是全维度的、超级反动的、超敏感的彩色胶片和玻璃屏幕后面的心理胶带

vocabulary.definition: adv. 心不在焉, 抽出了, 分心, 出神
vocabulary.context: The only flaw to the illusion was the open door through which he could see his wife, far down the dark hall, like a framed picture, eating her dinner abstractedly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个幻觉的唯一缺陷是门开着，透过门，他可以看到他的妻子，在黑暗的大厅深处，像一幅镶框的画，心不在焉地吃着晚餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 自动性；[医] 自动性
vocabulary.context: Similarly, behind them, in the halls, lights went on and off as they left them behind, with a soft automaticity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 同样，在他们身后的大厅里，灯光随着他们离开而亮起又熄灭，带着一种柔和的自动性

vocabulary.definition: adv. 惊人地
vocabulary.context: And here were the lions now, fifteen feet away, so real, so feverishly and startlingly real that you could feel the prickling fur on your hand, and your mouth was stuffed with the dusty upholstery smell of their heated pelts, and the yellow of them was in your eyes like the yellow of an...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，狮子就在这儿，十五英尺远，那么真实，那么狂热，那么真实，你能感觉到你手上的皮毛刺痛，你的嘴里充满了它们加热的皮毛散发出的尘土飞扬的气味，它们的黄色在你的眼睛里就像是......的黄色

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使敏感, 使具有感光性；v.i. 变得敏感
vocabulary.context: Their approach sensitized a switch somewhere and the nursery light flicked on when they came within ten feet of it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的接近使某处的开关敏感，当他们距离婴儿室灯不到十英尺时，婴儿室的灯就会亮起

vocabulary.definition: adj. 体操的, 体育的
vocabulary.context: It was all right to exercise one's mind with gymnastic fantasies, but when the lively child mind settled on one pattern...?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 用体操幻想来锻炼自己的头脑是可以的，但是当活泼的孩子的头脑固定在一种模式上时......？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 癔病的, 歇斯底里的；n. 癔病患者
vocabulary.context: The two children were in hysterics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两个孩子处于歇斯底里状态

vocabulary.definition: n. 快乐, 高兴, 愉悦
vocabulary.context: "All about Africa and everything," said the father with false joviality.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "关于非洲的一切，"父亲假装高兴地说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 隔音的
vocabulary.context: They walked down the hall of their soundproofed Happylife Home, which had cost them thirty thousand dollars installed, this house which clothed and fed and rocked them to sleep and played and sang and was good to them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们沿着隔音的快乐生活之家的大厅走去，这栋房子花了他们三万美元安装，这座房子为他们提供衣服、食物、摇晃让他们入睡、玩耍、唱歌，对他们很好

vocabulary.definition: n. (南非洲的)草原
vocabulary.context: Now, as George and Lydia Hadley stood in the center of the room, the walls began to purr and recede into crystalline distance, it seemed, and presently an African veldt appeared, in three dimensions, on all sides, in color reproduced to the final pebble and bit of straw.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，当乔治和莉迪亚·哈德利站在房间中央时，墙壁开始发出咕噜声，似乎后退到水晶般的距离，不久，一片非洲草原出现在三个维度上，四面八方，颜色再现为最后的卵石和稻草

vocabulary.definition: n. 硫, 硫磺；[化] 硫
vocabulary.context: Katherine Johnson was born in 1918 in White Sulphur Springs, West Virginia.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯瑟琳·约翰逊 1918 年出生于西弗吉尼亚州白硫磺泉市

vocabulary.definition: n. 开路的人, 开拓者
vocabulary.context: In a time when minorities held very few jobs in mathematics and science, Johnson was a trailblazer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在少数族裔在数学和科学领域占据很少职位的时代，约翰逊是一位开拓者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 纪念碑的, 做为纪念的, 不朽的
vocabulary.context: Her work in calculating the paths for spaceships to travel was monumental in helping NASA successfully put an American in orbit around Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在计算宇宙飞船航行路径方面的工作对于帮助美国宇航局成功地将美国人送入地球轨道具有里程碑意义

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好问的, 想知道的, 好追根究底的
vocabulary.context: Schiefflin Claytor, recognized Johnson's bright and inquisitive mind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Schiefflin Claytor 认识到约翰逊聪明而好奇的头脑

vocabulary.definition: adj. 仪器的, 器具的, 可作为手段的；[医] 器械的
vocabulary.context: Once again, Johnson's calculations were instrumental in NASA's success.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 约翰逊的计算再一次对 NASA 的成功发挥了重要作用

vocabulary.definition: n. 轨道, 弹道, 轨线；[化] 轨道
vocabulary.context: She began calculating the flight path, or trajectory path, for the rocket to put the first American in space in 1961.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她开始计算 1961 年将第一个美国人送入太空的火箭的飞行路径或弹道路径

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 沉浸, 使陷入；[医] 浸[入]
vocabulary.context: At West Virginia State College, Johnson became immersed in the math program.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在西弗吉尼亚州立大学，约翰逊沉浸在数学课程中

vocabulary.definition: adv. 鲜艳, 强烈, 明亮, 鲜明, 活泼, 有生气, 生动, 清晰, 逼真
vocabulary.context: Even when she was in her 90s, Johnson could vividly recall watching her older siblings go to school, wishing so much that she could go with them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 即使在 90 多岁的时候，约翰逊仍能清楚地记得看着她的哥哥姐姐去上学，她非常希望自己能和他们一起去

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没有阻碍的, 不受妨碍的, 没有负担的, 没有家累的, 没有子女的
vocabulary.context: He firmly believed in unencumbered movement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他坚信无阻碍的运动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可证明的, 可查明的；[法] 可证明的, 可证实的
vocabulary.context: It was a provable fact that Rez dogs, by definition, had no masters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可以证明的事实是，根据定义，雷兹犬是没有主人的

vocabulary.definition: n. 狗窝；[电] 调谐箱
vocabulary.context: Ozzie usually slept in the doghouse out behind the old gas station, because there were more people coming and going from there and the chances of getting fed were quite high.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥齐通常睡在旧加油站后面的狗窝里，因为那里进出的人比较多，吃饱的机会也很大

vocabulary.definition: n. 炖锅
vocabulary.context: Marino came home that night with his pockets full of money and bought his grandmother a new stewpot.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那天晚上，马里诺带着满口袋的钱回家，给他的祖母买了一个新炖锅

vocabulary.definition: n. 盖屋顶的茅草, 用草盖的屋顶, 浓密头发；v.t. 用茅草覆盖
vocabulary.context: He was short and wide, only a few inches taller than his grandmother, with a thick thatch of black hair and mischievous brown eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他又矮又宽，只比他的祖母高几英寸，有着浓密的黑发和淘气的棕色眼睛

vocabulary.definition: pron. 有人, 某人
vocabulary.context: A lot of someones would come if Ozzie had anything to say about it!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果奥齐对此有什么要说的，很多人都会来！

vocabulary.definition: n. 玉米粉蒸肉
vocabulary.context: Cruz, never one to waste, would often give any leftover fried chicken she had to Ozzie, along with any other scraps of tamales, refritos, pastelitos, and calabacitas, if he showed up on Sundays just after the children and grandchildren had been stuffed full of Sunday lunch and piled into their cars and trucks to head back to their own homes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 克鲁兹从不浪费，她经常会把她剩下的炸鸡，连同其他玉米粉蒸肉、炸薯条、意大利面和卡拉巴塔饼一起送给奥齐，如果他在周日孩子们和孙子们吃饱了周日午餐并堆进汽车和卡车回家后出现的话

vocabulary.definition: n. 狼, 残忍贪婪之人, 极度穷困；v.t. 狼吞虎咽, 大吃
vocabulary.context: Ozzie had wolfed it down (pardon the expression) and then sat in the dusty backyard out under the stars, content.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥齐狼吞虎咽地吃完了（请原谅我的表达方式），然后坐在满是灰尘的后院星空下，心满意足

vocabulary.definition: adj. 生活奢华的, 放荡的
vocabulary.context: It made him want to dance, and he did a little high-stepping to the beat of the drum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这让他想跳舞，他随着鼓点迈出了一点高步

vocabulary.definition: adj. 郁闷的, 孤僻的
vocabulary.context: "And pray someone notices us," added Eli, looking morose.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "祈祷有人注意到我们，"伊莱补充道，看上去很郁闷

vocabulary.definition: adj. 结痂的, 下贱的；[医] 痂的, 疥疮的
vocabulary.context: to see of your friends but their calves, which are scabby,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 去看你的朋友，但看他们的小腿，那是痂，

vocabulary.context: and crushed mint, the brittle, pissy sumac.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在是如此真实：脚踝被剥皮，肋骨断裂

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最喜欢玩的地方，已被拆除和风化

vocabulary.context: the pin oaks are popping in their sockets, the hillside
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 山坡上的针橡树在它们的插座中爆裂

vocabulary.definition: n. 白痴, 极蠢之人；[医] 白痴者, 痴子
vocabulary.context: will use the word idiot, rolling their hands in the air,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 会使用"白痴"这个词，在空中滚动双手，

vocabulary.context: Their faces, you know, are blank with anticipation,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你知道，他们的脸上充满了期待，面无表情，

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可能, 也许
vocabulary.context: another thing you couldn't possibly know was coming,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一件你不可能知道的事情即将发生，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 欢乐的, 高兴的
vocabulary.context: In such a jocund company:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这样一个欢乐的公司里：

vocabulary.definition: n. 谷, 溪谷, 告别；interj. 再见
vocabulary.context: That floats on high o'er vales and hills,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 漂浮在高高的山谷和山丘上，

vocabulary.context: Tossing their heads in sprightly dance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 欢快地跳舞

vocabulary.context: They stretched in never-ending line
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们排成永无休止的队伍

vocabulary.definition: adj. 沉思的, 哀思的, 忧郁的
vocabulary.context: In vacant or in pensive mood,

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 沿着海湾边缘：

vocabulary.context: Which is the bliss of solitude;
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是孤独的幸福；

vocabulary.definition: n. 投掷, 抛, 摇摆, 震荡, 掷钱币决定；v.t. 投掷, 猛抬, 摇荡, 使不安, 掷钱币决定；v.i. 被到处扔, 摇摆, 颠簸, 辗转, 掷钱币决定某事
vocabulary.context: Tossing their heads in sprightly dance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 欢快地跳舞

vocabulary.definition: n. （拥有价值数百万英镑、美元财产的）大富翁
vocabulary.context: Nearly every cabin passenger was a multi-millionaire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几乎每位客舱乘客都是百万富翁

vocabulary.definition: n. 海中怪兽, 巨轮
vocabulary.context: - The Titanic is the greatest of modern leviathans, being even bigger than the monster Olympic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: - 泰坦尼克号是现代巨兽中最伟大的，甚至比巨型奥林匹克号还要大

vocabulary.definition: n. 大缆, 系船索, 曳船索
vocabulary.context: When she was drawing out from Southampton docks, the suction she created in the harbor dislodged the American liner New York from her berth, breaking the two heavy hawsers like pack threads.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她从南安普顿码头驶出时，她在港口产生的吸力将美国班轮纽约号从泊位上移开，两条沉重的缆索像包装线一样折断

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不等同的, 不能比拟的, 无敌的
vocabulary.context: The disaster to the Titanic is unequalled in the history of navigation: The largest, most luxurious and best appointed vessel that ever floated, she seemed proof against any disaster.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 泰坦尼克号遭受的灾难在航海史上是无与伦比的：作为有史以来最大、最豪华、设备最好的船只，她似乎能够抵御任何灾难

vocabulary.definition: n. 财政家, 金融家；v.i. 从事欺骗性金融活动, 欺骗
vocabulary.context: The largest, most luxurious and best appointed vessel ever laid down, she seemed proof against any disaster, and it is to the very fact that she was a new steamer that the passengers on board, noted financiers and society leaders, owe their lives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为有史以来最大、最豪华、设备最好的船只，她似乎可以抵御任何灾难，事实上，她是一艘新的轮船，船上的乘客、著名的金融家和社会领袖都欠了他们的生命

vocabulary.definition: adv. 豪华地；奢侈地
vocabulary.context: She also is the most luxuriously fitted and furnished vessel ever sent to sea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她也是有史以来装备最豪华、家具最齐全的出海船只

vocabulary.definition: n. 吨位；[化] 吨位
vocabulary.context: Her registered tonnage is 43,000 tons, and her displacement 66,000 tons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的注册吨位为43,000吨，排水量为66,000吨

vocabulary.definition: n. 伯爵夫人, 女伯爵
vocabulary.context: The passengers on the Titanic included some of the best known names in America. Mr. and John Jacob Astor, Alfred G. Vanderbilt, Bruce Ismay, Clarence Moore, Mr. and Mrs. Isadore Straus, Countess Rothes, Archie Butt, Mrs. L. Appleton, Mr. and Mrs. Washington Dodge, and Benjamin Guggenheim were among them. Nearly every cabin passenger was a multi-millionaire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 泰坦尼克号上的乘客包括一些美国最知名的名字。约翰·雅各布·阿斯特夫妇、阿尔弗雷德·G·范德比尔特、布鲁斯·伊斯梅、克拉伦斯·摩尔、伊萨多尔·斯特劳斯夫妇、罗斯伯爵夫人、阿奇·巴特、L·阿普尔顿夫人、华盛顿·道奇夫妇以及本杰明·古根海姆都在其中。几乎每一位机舱乘客都是百万富翁

vocabulary.definition: adv. 尖锐地, 剧烈地
vocabulary.context: Smith, admiral of the White Star fleet of liners and in command of the Titanic , realized acutely the danger to his passengers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 史密斯是白星邮轮舰队的海军上将，也是泰坦尼克号的船长，他敏锐地意识到乘客面临的危险

vocabulary.definition: n. 气流, 草稿, 汇票, 通风, 拉, 牵引；v.t. 起草, 征兵, 选派
vocabulary.context: She turned her prow toward the wounded giant of the seas, and set out under forced draught.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她将船头转向受伤的海洋巨人，并在强风下出发

vocabulary.definition: adj. 空气动力学的
vocabulary.context: Of course I would add the bonus of breasts, but not too large; Supergirl had to be aerodynamic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然我会加上胸部的奖励，但不要太大；女超人必须符合空气动力学

vocabulary.definition: adj. 超声波的；[医] 超声[波]的
vocabulary.context: Sleek and hard as a supersonic missile.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 像超音速导弹一样光滑而坚硬

vocabulary.definition: adj. 手掌的, 足底的；[医] 掌的, 跖的
vocabulary.context: She'd sigh deeply and say the same thing the view from her kitchen window always inspired her to say: Ay, si yo pudiera volar.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她会深深叹息，并说出同样的话，从厨房窗户看到的景色总是激励她说：Ay, si yo pudiera volar

vocabulary.definition: n. <西> 地方行政区域
vocabulary.context: From up there, over the rooftops, I could see everything, even beyond the few blocks of our barrio; with my X-ray vision I could look inside the homes of people who interested me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从那里，越过屋顶，我可以看到一切，甚至超出了我们街区的几个街区；凭借我的 X 光视力，我可以看到我感兴趣的人的家中

vocabulary.definition: n. 白鼬, 白鼬毛皮；[法] 法官职位, 法官制服
vocabulary.context: Once I saw our landlord, whom I knew my parents feared, sitting in a treasure-room dressed in an ermine coat and a large gold crown.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一次，我看到我们的房东，我知道我的父母很害怕他，他穿着一件貂皮大衣，戴着一顶大金王冠，坐在一个宝库里

vocabulary.definition: n. 脚尖；趾尖；v.i. 用脚尖走；adv. 用脚尖；adj. 踮着脚走的；偷偷摸摸的
vocabulary.context: Once on the roof, my parents safely asleep in their beds, I would get on tip-toe, arms outstretched in the position for flight and jump out my fifty-story-high window into the black lake of the sky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一旦到达屋顶，我的父母在床上安全地睡着了，我就会踮起脚尖，张开双臂，做出飞行的姿势，从五十层高的窗户跳入天空的黑色湖水中

vocabulary.definition: n. 困扰, 困扰人的情绪；[医] 强迫观念
vocabulary.context: an expensive type of fur coat dreams in those days by focusing on the object of my current obsession.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一件昂贵的皮草大衣是我当时的梦想，专注于我现在痴迷的对象

vocabulary.definition: adv. 突然地, 唐突地
vocabulary.context: Not abruptly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不是突然的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 把...做得过分, 过分依赖...的力量, 夸张, 把...演得过火
vocabulary.context: But at the risk of twisting any of these precious good-news stories into more bad news, experts say there may be a downside to overplaying it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但专家表示，冒着将这些宝贵的好消息扭曲成更多坏消息的风险，过度渲染可能会产生负面影响

vocabulary.definition: n. 近视；[医] 近视
vocabulary.context: "There are lots of people who suffer from moral myopia, and so when you see this good happening, it renews some of your faith," says University of Texas professor Mimi Drumwright.

vocabulary.definition: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；v.t. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，有些人质疑传播这种"好"消息是否真的是好消息

vocabulary.definition: n. 庆祝, 祭祀, 节日；v.t. 宴请, 招待

vocabulary.definition: n. 空想社会改良家

vocabulary.definition: n. 赌气, 愤怒, 不快, 凹凸织物；v.t. 伤害...自尊心, 激怒, 刺激, 引起兴趣, 使兴奋

vocabulary.context: Just the head, however, is preserved, as it was broken off the body in antiquity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，只有头部被保存下来，因为它在古代是从身体上折下来的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 嵌入, 镶嵌, 装帧；n. 镶嵌物, 镶嵌工艺, 镶补
vocabulary.context: The head of Augustus, now housed in the British Museum, is the only example to survive with the inlaid eyes intact.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥古斯都的头像现藏于大英博物馆，是唯一幸存且镶嵌眼睛完好无损的例子

vocabulary.definition: n. 敲奏编钟的一种技巧
vocabulary.context: Sculptors carved likenesses of him that emphasized his different religious and political roles, as is seen in the statue of Augustus as Pontifex Maximus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雕塑家雕刻了他的肖像，强调了他不同的宗教和政治角色，正如奥古斯都大主教雕像中所见

vocabulary.definition: n. 唯心主义, 观念论, 唯心论, 理想主义
vocabulary.context: The idealism in his sculptures was meant to communicate to viewers his desire to establish a "Golden Age" in Rome.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的雕塑中的理想主义旨在向观众传达他在罗马建立"黄金时代"的愿望

vocabulary.definition: adv. 广大地, 许多, 巨大
vocabulary.context: This is vastly different from the portraiture that came before his reign, the period known as the Roman Republic, when portraits of the leaders depicted them with wrinkles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这与他统治之前的罗马共和国时期的肖像画有很大不同，当时的领导人肖像画上有皱纹

vocabulary.definition: n. 半影, 明暗交界部分, 边缘部分, 周围的气氛；[化] 半影
vocabulary.context: The second shadow is called the penumbra.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二个阴影称为半影

vocabulary.definition: adj. 环形的；[医] 环状的
vocabulary.context: The third type is an annular solar eclipse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第三种是日环食

vocabulary.definition: n. 冠, 冠状物, 副冠, 根颈, 头顶, 牙冠, 檐板, 日冕, 月华, 日华, 电晕, 光圈；[计] 电晕, 冠
vocabulary.context: Scientists use solar eclipses as an opportunity to study the sun's corona.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家利用日食作为研究太阳日冕的机会

vocabulary.definition: n. 阴影, 本影, 暗影；[化] 本影
vocabulary.context: The first shadow is called the umbra.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第一个阴影称为本影

vocabulary.definition: n. 全体, 总数, 全食
vocabulary.context: On Monday, April 8, 2024, most of North and Central America will be treated to an eclipse of the sun that has been dubbed by some the "Great North American Eclipse." While most of North and Central America will experience a partial solar eclipse, anyone within the path of totality can see one of nature's most awe-inspiring sights - a total solar eclipse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2024 年 4 月 8 日星期一，北美和中美洲的大部分地区将迎来日食，被一些人称为"北美大日食"。虽然北美和中美洲的大部分地区都会经历日偏食，但任何在日全食路径内的人都可以看到大自然最令人惊叹的景象之一--日全食

vocabulary.definition: adj. 部分的, 偏袒的, 偏爱的；n. 分音
vocabulary.context: There are two types of lunar eclipses: total lunar eclipses and partial lunar eclipses.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 月食有两种类型：月全食和月偏食

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 配音, 轻点, 授予称号, 击；n. 一下击鼓声, 笨蛋
vocabulary.context: On Monday, April 8, 2024, most of North and Central America will be treated to an eclipse of the sun that has been dubbed by some the "Great North American Eclipse." While most of North and Central America will experience a partial solar eclipse, anyone within the path of totality can see one of nature's most awe-inspiring sights - a total solar eclipse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2024 年 4 月 8 日星期一，北美和中美洲的大部分地区将迎来日食，被一些人称为"北美大日食"。虽然北美和中美洲的大部分地区都会经历日偏食，但任何在日全食路径内的人都可以看到大自然最令人惊叹的景象之一--日全食

vocabulary.definition: n. 闪耀光, 刺眼；v.i. 发眩光, 瞪视；v.t. 瞪眼表示
vocabulary.context: During an annular eclipse, NASA uses ground and space instruments to view the corona when the moon blocks the sun's glare.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在日环食期间，当月球阻挡太阳的眩光时，美国宇航局使用地面和空间仪器来观察日冕

vocabulary.definition: n. 数百
vocabulary.context: Hundreds of years ago, when people observed the moon during an eclipse, they discovered that the shape of Earth is round.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 数百年前，当人们在月食期间观察月球时，发现地球的形状是圆形的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未被充分代表的
vocabulary.context: I wanted to tell the stories that weren't being told, the ones featuring diverse characters in non-stereotypical roles, the ones that blurred the line between "right" and "wrong", the ones that reveal the humanity in those who are underrepresented or misunderstood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想讲述那些未被讲述的故事，那些以非刻板角色扮演不同角色的故事，那些模糊"对"与"错"之间界限的故事，那些揭示那些未被充分代表或被误解的人的人性的故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 长期以来梦寐以求的东西
vocabulary.context: This wasn't really a big deal until a couple of years later when peer acceptance became the Holy Grail and I discovered that my African-American peers were suspicious of me because I spent the majority of my time in school with white kids.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这并不是什么大问题，直到几年后，当同侪接受成为圣杯时，我发现我的非裔美国同龄人对我产生怀疑，因为我大部分时间都在学校与白人孩子一起度过

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 爱情上对...不忠, 骗；adj. 有过两次的
vocabulary.context: By then, I was a two-time college dropout who'd hopped a plane to Israel with all of forty dollars in my pocket, hoping to find a remedy for an eleven-year identity crisis among the ruins of the Bible's holiest city.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那时，我已经两次从大学辍学，口袋里揣着四十美元乘飞机飞往以色列，希望能在《圣经》最神圣之城的废墟中找到解决长达十一年身份危机的方法

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重读, 再读
vocabulary.context: Since that summer I turned 23, I've reread most of the books that I was unable to connect with as a teen, and I'm happy to report that I quite enjoy them now that I've found the shoes for myself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自从那年夏天我满 23 岁以来，我重读了大部分青少年时期无法理解的书籍，我很高兴地告诉大家，现在我已经找到了适合自己的鞋子，我非常喜欢它们

vocabulary.definition: adj. 谚语的, 谚语式的, 闻名的
vocabulary.context: As I listened to these stories and made an attempt at empathy - putting myself in their proverbial shoe - my perspectives shifted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我聆听这些故事并尝试换位思考时--设身处地为他们着想--我的观点发生了转变

vocabulary.definition: n. 小宇宙, 小世界, 人类
vocabulary.context: In fifth grade, I tested into the gifted program and became the only Black girl in my school's microcosm of academic high achievers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 五年级时，我参加了天才计划，并成为我学校学术高成就者缩影中唯一的黑人女孩

vocabulary.definition: n. 细微差别
vocabulary.context: Life became less about right and wrong, good and bad, black and white, and more about complexity and nuance, the power of the human being to bring either calm or chaos into the lives of others and the world around them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 生活不再那么关乎对与错、好与坏、黑与白，而更多地关乎复杂性和细微差别，以及人类为他人的生活和周围世界带来平静或混乱的力量

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 侵略, 劫掠, 袭击；n. 侵掠, 侵略, 攻击
vocabulary.context: Reading, which at one point had been this epic foray into magic and mystery and faraway places, became nothing more than another piece of drudgery to check off my homework list.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阅读曾一度是对魔法、神秘和遥远地方的史诗般的尝试，但现在却变成了核对我作业清单的另一项苦差事

vocabulary.definition: n. 象征主义, 符号论；[医] 象征主义
vocabulary.context: The Giver and Animal Farm , The Odyssey , Romeo and Juliet , Lord of the Flies , and Fahrenheit 451 were the books we were to read and dissect for theme and symbolism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《给予者》、《动物农场》、《奥德赛》、《罗密欧与朱丽叶》、《蝇王》和《华氏 451》是我们要阅读和剖析主题和象征意义的书

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不过，这瓶酒上并没有标明"有毒"，爱丽丝就大胆地尝了尝，发现味道非常好（事实上，它有一种樱桃馅饼、蛋奶冻、菠萝、烤火鸡、太妃糖和热黄油吐司的混合味道），她很快就喝完了

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...对她来说，说一遍仍然是很好的做法）" - 是的，这是正确的距离 - 但我想知道我必须到什么纬度或经度？" （爱丽丝不知道纬度或经度是什么，但认为它们是很好的宏伟词汇。）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不平衡的, 错乱的, 不稳定的, 收支不平衡的；[法] 不均衡的, 不平衡的, 精神错乱的
vocabulary.context: Since all atoms want to be balanced, the atom that has been "unbalanced" will look for a free electron to fill the place of the missing one.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于所有原子都希望保持平衡，因此"不平衡"的原子会寻找一个自由电子来填补缺失的位置

vocabulary.definition: n. 电子；[化] 电子
vocabulary.context: Electrons spin around the center, or nucleus, of atoms, in the same way the moon spins around the earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 电子绕着原子的中心或原子核旋转，就像月球绕着地球旋转一样

vocabulary.definition: adv. 松弛地, 宽松地, 不紧
vocabulary.context: Some kinds of atoms have loosely attached electrons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 某些原子具有松散连接的电子

vocabulary.definition: adv. 明确地, 肯定地, 无疑地, (非正式)确实地, 真正地
vocabulary.context: An atom that loses electrons has more protons than electrons and is positively charged.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 失去电子的原子具有比电子更多的质子并且带正电

vocabulary.definition: adv. 通常, 大抵
vocabulary.context: But no matter how many particles an atom has, the number of electrons usually needs to be the same as the number of protons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但无论原子有多少个粒子，电子的数量通常需要与质子的数量相同

vocabulary.definition: n. 联邦制, 联邦主义；[法] 联邦制
vocabulary.context: The balance of power between the central government and all of the state governments is called federalism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中央政府与各州政府之间的权力平衡称为联邦制

vocabulary.definition: adj. 两党的
vocabulary.context: The first two-party system, consisting of the Federalists and the Anti-Federalists, was formed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第一个由联邦党和反联邦党组成的两党制度形成

vocabulary.definition: n. 课税, 征税, 抽税, 税款, 估定的税额；[经] 征税, 纳税, 税制
vocabulary.context: Colonists started using the phrase "taxation without representation" to talk about this problem.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 殖民者开始使用"无代表征税"一词来谈论这个问题

vocabulary.definition: adj. 选举人的, 选举的, (有关)选举的；[法] 选举的, 选举人的, 由选举人组成的
vocabulary.context: The results are counted later as part of the Electoral College.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 结果随后被计入选举团的一部分

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 批准, 认可；[经] 证实, 肯定, 确认
vocabulary.context: The papers worked, and by 1790, all 13 colonies ratified the U.S Constitution.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些文件发挥了作用，到 1790 年，所有 13 个殖民地都批准了美国宪法

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使摇动, 搅动, 使激动, 使不安；v.i. 鼓动, 煽动
vocabulary.context: The colonists became increasingly agitated with how much power the king possessed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 殖民者对国王拥有的权力越来越不满

vocabulary.definition: n. 妥协, 折中, 折中方案, 和解；v.i. 妥协处理；v.t. 危害
vocabulary.context: A CONVENTION OF COMPROMISES
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妥协公约

vocabulary.definition: n. 责任, 关税, 职务, 尊敬；[化] 职责
vocabulary.context: This was a document that explained the duties of the states' governments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一份解释各州政府职责的文件

vocabulary.definition: n. 苏萨号
vocabulary.context: Ravenna, Ohio, is not the sort of place anybody wants to make movies about, Emmanuel Miller, a senior tuba and sousaphone player, said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 俄亥俄州拉文纳不是任何人都想拍电影的地方，资深大号和大号演奏家伊曼纽尔·米勒 (Emmanuel Miller) 说

vocabulary.definition: n. 回飞镖, 飞去归来器
vocabulary.context: But he also sees himself as a boomerang - someone who will inevitably be drawn back to this corner of the world when "quiet" and "boring" no longer seem so bad.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他也将自己视为一个回旋镖--当"安静"和"无聊"不再那么糟糕时，他将不可避免地被拉回到世界的这个角落

vocabulary.definition: n. 长号；[电] 伸缩喇叭
vocabulary.context: "It definitely helps that we have a small school, because we've all known each other our whole lives," said Trinity Dunch, who plays the trombone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们有一所小学校，这绝对有帮助，因为我们一生都互相认识，"长号演奏家特里尼蒂·邓奇 (Trinity Dunch) 说

vocabulary.definition: n. 重新设定, 重新组合, 重排版；v.t. 重新设定, 重置, 重新组合；v.i. 重置, 清零；[计] 重置, 清零
vocabulary.context: For the kids who call it home, the band room is a place of real refuge: somewhere to go during free periods, if you don't like your lunch or if you just need a few minutes to reset your day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于那些称之为家的孩子来说，乐队室是一个真正的避难所：在空闲时间，如果你不喜欢午餐，或者如果你只需要几分钟来重新安排你的一天，这里是你可以去的地方

vocabulary.definition: n. 感应
vocabulary.context: Otherwise, the school vibes with the band.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除此之外，学校里还有乐队的气氛

vocabulary.definition: adj. 初次的
vocabulary.context: "There are very few anxieties I've felt more extreme than that of being a first-time freshman at band camp," she said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "很少有比第一次参加乐队训练营的新生更让我感到焦虑的了，"她说

vocabulary.definition: n. 大胆, 厚颜无耻
vocabulary.context: If they ever have the audacity to touch the instruments and the band kids find out about it, they're like, this is our space."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他们有胆量触摸乐器并且乐队的孩子们发现了这一点，他们就会说，这是我们的空间。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 毛骨悚然的, 令人兴奋的, 令人发抖的
vocabulary.context: That spotlight, while thrilling, can also be terrifying.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 聚光灯虽然令人兴奋，但也可能令人恐惧

vocabulary.definition: [生化] vi.(植物等)进行光合作用,实行光能合成；v.t. (通过)光合(作用)产生
vocabulary.context: This slows coral growth because the algae inside coral needs sunlight to photosynthesize.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这会减慢珊瑚的生长，因为珊瑚内的藻类需要阳光才能进行光合作用

vocabulary.definition: n. 鹿角, 石松, 大珊瑚
vocabulary.context: Its branching corals like staghorn and elkhorn have had a hard time fighting off diseases in the past 40 years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 过去 40 年来，鹿角珊瑚和鹿角珊瑚等分支珊瑚一直难以抵抗疾病

vocabulary.definition: n. 息肉, 水螅虫；[医] 息肉
vocabulary.context: Corals are made up of tiny animals called polyps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 珊瑚由称为息肉的微小动物组成

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 再生；重新长出
vocabulary.context: Scientists at CRA don't regrow coral forests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: CRA 的科学家不会重新种植珊瑚森林

vocabulary.definition: n. (防晒油中的)遮光剂
vocabulary.context: Wear sunscreen marked "reef safe" when you swim.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 游泳时请涂抹标有"珊瑚礁安全"的防晒霜

vocabulary.definition: n. 银莲花, 海葵；[医] 银莲花属(毛莨科)
vocabulary.context: They are related to anemones and jellyfish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们与海葵和水母有关

vocabulary.definition: n. 泥沼, 沼泽, 蜕下的皮, 腐肉；v.t. 使陷入泥沼, 使沉沦, 脱落, 抛弃；v.i. 在泥浆中跋涉, 蜕皮, 脱落
vocabulary.context: Kettle says "it's highly contagious and it's highly deadly." It causes coral tissue to die and slough off its skeleton.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯特尔说"它具有高度传染性和高度致命性。"它会导致珊瑚组织死亡并脱落骨骼

vocabulary.definition: v. 抵抗, 耐得住, 抵制, 反抗；n. 防染材料
vocabulary.context: Mote breeds these corals in its lab to see, "Can we make a generation of corals that can resist both?" says Kettle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Mote 在其实验室中培育这些珊瑚，目的是为了看看"我们能否培育出能够抵抗这两种情况的一代珊瑚？"凯特尔说

vocabulary.definition: n. 可见性, 能见度, 能见距离；[计] 可见性
vocabulary.context: has also grounded helicopters because of poor visibility.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还因能见度差而停飞了直升机

vocabulary.definition: n. 残株, 茬
vocabulary.context: Experts say that the burning of crop stubble by farmers is adding to the pollution.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 专家表示，农民焚烧农作物残茬加剧了污染

vocabulary.definition: n. 爆竹, 鞭炮；[化] 爆竹; 鞭炮
vocabulary.context: Most recently, firecrackers were banned during the festival season of Diwali.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最近，排灯节期间禁止燃放鞭炮

vocabulary.definition: v. 取消( cancel的过去式和过去分词 ); 废除; 注销; 删去
vocabulary.context: In response, Delhi has canceled school.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为回应，德里已经取消了学校的上课

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 洒, 散置, 撒, 点缀；v.i. 洒, 撒, 下小雨；n. 洒, 撒, 散置, 小雨, 少量
vocabulary.context: They do so by sprinkling water onto the city.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们通过向城市洒水来做到这一点

vocabulary.definition: n. 小麦
vocabulary.context: Crop stubble refers to what's left over after crops like wheat have been harvested.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 农作物残茬是指小麦等农作物收获后剩下的东西

vocabulary.definition: n. 交通工具, 车辆, 传播媒介；[化] 载体; 运载体; 漆料
vocabulary.context: They also plan to crack down on vehicles that do not pass pollution tests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还计划严厉打击未通过污染检测的车辆

vocabulary.context: What happens when there is so much pollution, or smog, in the air that it makes people sick?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当空气中污染或烟雾过多导致人们生病时会发生什么？

vocabulary.definition: n. 激励, 提示, 提醒物, 提词, 付款期限；adj. 迅速的, 敏捷的, 立刻的, 提词员的；v.t. 激励, 鼓动, 提示；adv. 准时地；[计] 提示符; DOS内部命令:设定DOS命令行的提示符

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雾霾的新上升促使印度政府采取行动

vocabulary.definition: n. 非战斗员；adj. 非战斗员的
vocabulary.context: A 1940 law allowed conscientious objectors to serve the war effort in "noncombatant" positions, so Doss went with his company as a medic to the Pacific theater.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1940 年的一项法律允许出于良心拒服兵役者以"非战斗"职位为战争服务，因此多斯作为一名军医随他的连队前往太平洋战区

vocabulary.definition: v. 改造, 改制, 重新创造( re-create的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: "It was full of caves and holes and the Japanese were dug in underground," says Mel Gibson, who re-created the battle in Hacksaw Ridge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "那里充满了洞穴和洞，日本人是在地下挖的，"重现钢锯岭战斗的梅尔·吉布森说

vocabulary.definition: n. 反对者, 提出异议的人；[法] 反对者, 表示异议者
vocabulary.context: "He just didn't fit into the Army's model of what a good soldier would be," says Terry Benedict, who made a documentary about Doss called The Conscientious Objector.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他只是不符合陆军的好士兵模式，"特里·本尼迪克特说，他制作了一部关于多斯的纪录片，名为《良心拒服兵役者》

vocabulary.definition: n. 高地, 高原, (上升后的)稳定水平；[医] 高原, 平顶, 坪
vocabulary.context: And at Okinawa in the spring of 1945, Doss' company faced a grueling task: Climb a steep, jagged cliff - sometimes called Hacksaw Ridge - to a plateau where thousands of heavily armed Japanese soldiers were waiting for them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1945 年春天，在冲绳，多斯的连队面临着一项艰巨的任务：爬上陡峭的锯齿状悬崖（有时称为钢锯岭），到达高原，那里有数千名全副武装的日本士兵正在等待他们

vocabulary.definition: n. 炮火, 号炮报时, 炮击
vocabulary.context: Under a barrage of gunfire and explosions, Doss crawled on the ground from wounded soldier to wounded soldier.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在连绵的枪声和爆炸声中，多斯在地上从一个受伤的士兵爬到另一个受伤的士兵

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛圈, 毛圈织物
vocabulary.context: "He just didn't fit into the Army's model of what a good soldier would be," says Terry Benedict, who made a documentary about Doss called The Conscientious Objector.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他只是不符合陆军的好士兵模式，"特里·本尼迪克特说，他制作了一部关于多斯的纪录片，名为《良心拒服兵役者》

vocabulary.definition: n. 苜蓿属植物, 医师, 医科学生
vocabulary.context: He enlisted in the Army as a combat medic because he believed in the cause, but had vowed not to kill.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他作为战地医务人员入伍，因为他相信这一事业，但发誓不杀人

vocabulary.definition: n. 电影制作人
vocabulary.context: "They just saw him as a slacker," the filmmaker says, "someone who shouldn't have been allowed in the Army, and somebody who was their weakest link in the chain."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他们只是把他视为一个懒鬼，"电影制片人说，"一个不应该被允许参军的人，一个是他们链条中最薄弱的一环。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 很重地, 严重地, 难以忍受地
vocabulary.context: And at Okinawa in the spring of 1945, Doss' company faced a grueling task: Climb a steep, jagged cliff - sometimes called Hacksaw Ridge - to a plateau where thousands of heavily armed Japanese soldiers were waiting for them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1945 年春天，在冲绳，多斯的连队面临着一项艰巨的任务：爬上陡峭的锯齿状悬崖（有时称为钢锯岭），到达高原，那里有数千名全副武装的日本士兵正在等待他们

vocabulary.definition: n. 回答者, 解答者, 答辩者；[法] 回答者, 答辩者
vocabulary.context: nine decades the answerer
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 九个十年的答题者

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 等待了漫长的隔离日子，

vocabulary.context: in their veins.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们的血管里

vocabulary.context: after leaving the sickness,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 病愈后，

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 谁成了我的祖父母

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埃利斯岛红砖之外

vocabulary.definition: n. 帝国, 帝权
vocabulary.context: the old Empires of Europe,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 欧洲的旧帝国，

vocabulary.definition: n. 自己的；adj. 自己的, 嫡亲的, 同胞的；v.t. 拥有, 支配, 自认, 承认, 顺从于；v.i. 承认, 供认
vocabulary.context: yet never owned their own.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但从未拥有过自己的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 故乡

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 定为货币, 铸造成货币

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人利用社交平台并将其内容货币化，或让赞助商向他们在其页面上发布内容付费

vocabulary.contextTranslation: SCAD 是众多充满年轻才华横溢的艺术家的艺术学校之一，这些艺术家在毕业时常常因为无法进入孤立和小集团的艺术社区而感到沮丧

vocabulary.definition: n. 影响者
vocabulary.context: Celso actually shot down that idea because he wanted to make it as an independent artist rather than a mainstream Instagram influencer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Celso 实际上否决了这个想法，因为他想以独立艺术家而非主流 Instagram 影响者的身份来实现这一目标

vocabulary.definition: adj. 轻视的
vocabulary.context: Although he was once dismissive and cynical about the influence of social media, Celso determined that if he wanted to increase the reach of his music, he needed to fully embrace the social media platform.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管塞尔索曾经对社交媒体的影响不屑一顾、愤世嫉俗，但他认为，如果他想扩大自己音乐的影响力，就需要完全拥抱社交媒体平台

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使绝缘, 隔离；[医] 绝缘

vocabulary.contextTranslation: SCAD 是众多充满年轻才华横溢的艺术家的艺术学校之一，这些艺术家在毕业时常常因为无法进入孤立和小集团的艺术社区而感到沮丧

vocabulary.definition: n. 签署者, 捐献者, 订户；[经] 定户
vocabulary.context: His popularity grew on YouTube, and Celso soon had over 100,000 subscribers on his YouTube channel.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在 YouTube 上的受欢迎程度不断上升，塞尔索的 YouTube 频道很快就拥有了超过 100,000 名订阅者

vocabulary.definition: n. 狗, 坏蛋；v.t. 跟踪, 尾随

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 少数幸运者也许能够通过顽强的毅力和努力获得认可，但大多数毕业生往往发现大门紧闭

vocabulary.definition: adj. 愤世嫉俗的, 讽刺的, 冷嘲的
vocabulary.context: Although he was once dismissive and cynical about the influence of social media, Celso determined that if he wanted to increase the reach of his music, he needed to fully embrace the social media platform.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管塞尔索曾经对社交媒体的影响不屑一顾、愤世嫉俗，但他认为，如果他想扩大自己音乐的影响力，就需要完全拥抱社交媒体平台

vocabulary.definition: n. 节杖, 王权；v.t. 拥登王位, 授与王权
vocabulary.context: The umbrella glowed like a scepter on the blue carpet while Mona, slumping over the keyboard, managed to eke out a fair rendition of a cat fight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雨伞像蓝色地毯上的权杖一样闪闪发光，而莫娜则趴在键盘上，勉强完成了一场猫打斗的公平表演

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者她可能在花店工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 行人穿越道
vocabulary.context: "You're blocking the whole crosswalk."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你挡住了整个人行横道。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可改变的, 可交换的；n. 有活动篷的汽车
vocabulary.context: "It's a convertible."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是一辆敞篷车。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易倒的, 不稳定的, 难对付的, 怕痒的
vocabulary.context: I wanted to tell her that I was the school spelling bee champion, that I wasn't ticklish, that I could do karate.

vocabulary.definition: n. 赤褐色；adj. 赤褐色的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 小心的, 慎重的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 听得见的；[电] 可闻的

vocabulary.definition: n. 堆叠, 堆, 大量, 书库, 枪架, 烟囱, 堆积, 存贮栈；v.t. 堆积, 堆满, 暗中对...做手脚；v.i. 堆起；[计] 堆积, 堆栈

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并将它们堆叠起来

vocabulary.definition: n. 过错, 故障, 毛病；v.t. 挑剔；v.i. 产生断层, 弄错；[计] 故障

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雅各就撕裂衣服，穿上麻衣，为他儿子哀哭了多日

vocabulary.definition: n. 贮水器, 水塘, 水箱；[化] 槽车
vocabulary.context: Throw him into this cistern here in the wilderness, but don't lay a hand on him." Reuben said this to rescue him from them and take him back to his father.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 把他扔进旷野的这个蓄水池里，但不要对他下手。"鲁本说这句话是为了把他从他们手中救出来，带回他父亲身边

vocabulary.definition: n. 没药树；[化] 没药
vocabulary.context: Their camels were loaded with spices, balm and myrrh, and they were on their way to take them down to Egypt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的骆驼满载着香料、香油和没药，正准备把它们带到埃及

vocabulary.definition: n. 束, 捆, 扎；v.t. 捆, 束
vocabulary.context: We were binding sheaves of grain out in the field when suddenly my sheaf rose and stood upright, while your sheaves gathered around mine and bowed down to it."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们正在田里捆麦穗，突然我的麦捆站了起来，而你们的麦捆也聚集在我的麦捆周围，向它下拜。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 装饰的, 华丽的
vocabulary.context: Now Israel loved Joseph more than any of his other sons, because he had been born to him in his old age; and he made an ornate robe for him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以色列爱约瑟胜过爱他的其他儿子，因为约瑟是在约瑟年老时生的。并为他做了一件华丽的长袍

vocabulary.definition: adj. 残忍的, 凶猛的, 可怕的
vocabulary.context: "Come now, let's kill him and throw him into one of these cisterns and say that a ferocious animal devoured him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "来吧，我们杀了他，把他扔进一个蓄水池里，然后说有一只凶猛的动物把他吃掉了

vocabulary.definition: n. 残杀, 屠杀, 杀戮；v.t. 残杀, 屠杀, 亏本出售
vocabulary.context: Then they got Joseph's robe, slaughtered a goat and dipped the robe in the blood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他们拿了约瑟的袍子，宰了一只山羊，把袍子浸在血里

vocabulary.definition: num. 十七, 十七个
vocabulary.context: Joseph, a young man of seventeen, was tending the flocks with his brothers, the sons of Bilhah and the sons of Zilpah, his father's wives, and he brought their father a bad report about them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 约瑟是一个十七岁的年轻人，和他的兄弟，即他父亲的妻子辟拉的儿子和悉帕的儿子一起放羊，他给他们的父亲带来了关于他们的坏消息

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 计划, 打算, 意思是；[法] 想要, 打算, 意旨
vocabulary.context: His brothers said to him, "Do you intend to reign over us?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的兄弟们对他说："你想统治我们吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 凸版印刷术, 排印, 印刷版面式样
vocabulary.context: I learned about serif and san serif typefaces, about varying the amount of space between different letter combinations, about what makes great typography great.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我了解了衬线和无衬线字体，了解了不同字母组合之间的间距大小，了解了如何使出色的排版变得出色

vocabulary.definition: n. 漂亮的书写, 书法

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 整个校园的每张海报、每个抽屉上的每个标签都是精美的手写体

vocabulary.definition: n. 内窥镜；[医] 内窥镜, 内腔镜
vocabulary.context: Later that evening I had a biopsy, where they stuck an endoscope down my throat, through my stomach and into my intestines, put a needle into my pancreas and got a few cells from the tumor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那天晚上晚些时候，我进行了活检，他们将内窥镜插入我的喉咙，穿过我的胃，进入我的肠道，将一根针插入我的胰腺，从肿瘤中取出一些细胞

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无邪地；天真烂漫地
vocabulary.context: But I naively chose a college that was almost as expensive as Stanford, and all of my working-class parents' savings were being spent on my college tuition.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我天真地选择了一所几乎和斯坦福大学一样昂贵的大学，而我的工薪阶层父母的所有积蓄都花在了我的大学学费上

vocabulary.definition: n. 西文字体中的短细线, 衬线；[计] 衬线
vocabulary.context: I learned about serif and san serif typefaces, about varying the amount of space between different letter combinations, about what makes great typography great.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我了解了衬线和无衬线字体，了解了不同字母组合之间的间距大小，了解了如何使出色的排版变得出色

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的亲生母亲是一位年轻的未婚大学研究生，她决定将我送人收养

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那是在 20 世纪 60 年代末，个人电脑和桌面出版出现之前，所以这一切都是用打字机、剪刀和宝丽来相机制作的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我在大学时从未旁听过这一门课程，那么 Mac 就不会拥有多种字体或按比例间隔的字体

vocabulary.definition: n. 职业特性, 专业技巧, 职业行为, 职业作风, (褒)专业人员的特质, 职业化；[经] 职业特性, 职业作风, 职业化
vocabulary.context: I want to add that I wish I could talk to every man and woman who works for NASA, or who worked on this mission and tell them: "Your dedication and professionalism have moved and impressed us for decades.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想对观看航天飞机起飞现场直播的美国小学生说几句话

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他们，挑战者七人组，意识到了危险，但克服了它们并出色地完成了自己的工作

vocabulary.definition: num. 十九, 十九个

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 十九年前的今天，我们在一次可怕的地面事故中失去了三名宇航员

vocabulary.definition: n. 剧痛, 痛苦；v.t. 使极痛苦；v.i. 感到痛苦

vocabulary.definition: n. 样子, 礼貌, 风格；[法] 方式, 方法, 样式
vocabulary.context: The crew of the space shuttle Challenger honored us by the manner in which they lived their lives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 挑战者号航天飞机的机组人员以他们的生活方式向我们致敬

vocabulary.definition: n. 老人；陈旧之物
vocabulary.context: The creatures won't appear to age - young ones will snuff it as often as the oldies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些生物似乎不会变老--年轻人会像老人一样频繁地吸食它

vocabulary.definition: adj. 通用的, 多用途的；[化] 通用的
vocabulary.context: Hydra can use these all-purpose cells to continuously rebuild their bodies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 九头蛇可以利用这些通用细胞来不断重建它们的身体

vocabulary.definition: n. 水螅, 九头蛇, 难以根除之祸害
vocabulary.context: Since the early 1900s, people who'd worked with hydra claimed that the animals were immortal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自 1900 年代初以来，从事九头蛇研究的人们声称这些动物是不朽的

vocabulary.definition: n. 睫毛；[医] 睫[毛]

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们有睫毛那么长，生活在池塘里

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不断地, 连续地；[电] 连续地
vocabulary.context: Hydra can use these all-purpose cells to continuously rebuild their bodies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 九头蛇可以利用这些通用细胞来不断重建它们的身体

vocabulary.definition: n. 虾, 小虾, 矮子；v.i. 捕小虾
vocabulary.context: They attach themselves to pebbles and feed on insect larvae and tiny shrimp.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们附着在卵石上，以昆虫幼虫和小虾为食

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 改建, 重建, 改造；v.i. 重建
vocabulary.context: Hydra can use these all-purpose cells to continuously rebuild their bodies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 九头蛇可以利用这些通用细胞来不断重建它们的身体

vocabulary.definition: n. 厂主, 蛾；[机] 铣床
vocabulary.context: But that doesn't make them immortal, says Rich Miller of the University of Michigan: "A lack of aging is not the same thing as immortality." Imagine, for example, a population in which half of the animals die every minute, regardless of how old they are.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这并不能使他们永生，密歇根大学的里奇·米勒说："不衰老并不等于永生。"例如，想象一下，在一个种群中，每分钟就有一半的动物死亡，无论它们的年龄有多大

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不管, 不注意, 不顾
vocabulary.context: But that doesn't make them immortal, says Rich Miller of the University of Michigan: "A lack of aging is not the same thing as immortality." Imagine, for example, a population in which half of the animals die every minute, regardless of how old they are.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这并不能使他们永生，密歇根大学的里奇·米勒说："不衰老并不等于永生。"例如，想象一下，在一个种群中，每分钟就有一半的动物死亡，无论它们的年龄有多大

vocabulary.definition: adj. 新月形的
vocabulary.context: All that was needed was a small knife that had a crescent-shaped blade to pare off the end.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所需要的只是一把带有新月形刀片的小刀，用于削掉末端

vocabulary.definition: adj. 按字母次序的, 字母的
vocabulary.context: Both the Greeks and the Romans used an alphabetic system of writing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 希腊人和罗马人都使用字母书写系统

vocabulary.definition: n. 小牛的皮, 犊皮所制的革
vocabulary.context: There were two major types: vellum, made from calfskin, and parchment, made from calfskin, sheepskin, or goatskin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主要有两种类型：牛皮纸（由小牛皮制成）和羊皮纸（由小牛皮、绵羊皮或山羊皮制成）

vocabulary.definition: n. 音节主音；adj. 音节的
vocabulary.context: This means that, for them, each sign represented a single sound, as opposed to many older methods that centered on a syllabic system, with each sign representing a combination of sounds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着，对他们来说，每个符号代表一个声音，而不是许多以音节系统为中心的旧方法，每个符号代表声音的组合

vocabulary.definition: n. 可折闭的记事板, 可折闭的画
vocabulary.context: Such an object is known as a diptych, which is Greek for "two-folds." Those with three boards fastened together were known as triptychs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这样的物体被称为双联画，在希腊语中是"双折"的意思。那些由三块板固定在一起的被称为三联画

vocabulary.definition: n. 三张相联的图画, 三幅一联
vocabulary.context: Such an object is known as a diptych, which is Greek for "two-folds." Those with three boards fastened together were known as triptychs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这样的物体被称为双联画，在希腊语中是"双折"的意思。那些由三块板固定在一起的被称为三联画

vocabulary.definition: n. 上等皮纸, 皮纸文书, 牛皮纸；adj. 牛皮纸的
vocabulary.context: There were two major types: vellum, made from calfskin, and parchment, made from calfskin, sheepskin, or goatskin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主要有两种类型：牛皮纸（由小牛皮制成）和羊皮纸（由小牛皮、绵羊皮或山羊皮制成）

vocabulary.definition: n. 铁笔, 尖笔, 唱针；[计] 指示笔
vocabulary.context: It was soft, so writers could scratch words into it with a stick called a stylus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它很软，所以作家可以用称为手写笔的棍子在上面写字

vocabulary.definition: n. 内殿；[医] 小房, 小室, 细胞
vocabulary.context: All Doric and many Ionic temples were peripteral - that is, they had a colonnaded walkway (pteron) around a central rectangular room called the naos or cella.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有的多立克式和许多爱奥尼亚式神庙都是围柱式的--也就是说，它们在一个称为内殿或内殿的中央矩形房间周围有一条柱廊走道（pteron）

vocabulary.definition: n. (古希腊寺庙内殿前的)门廊
vocabulary.context: In front of the cella was the pronaos, an entryway with columns.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是鹰眼渴望的男人......

vocabulary.definition: n. 男孩
vocabulary.context: O, I got a zoo, I got a menagerie, inside my ribs, under my bony head, under my red-valve heart - and I got something else: it is a man-child heart, a woman-child heart: it is a father and mother and lover: it came from God-Knows-Where: it is going to God-Knows-Where - For I am the keeper of the zoo: I say yes and no: I sing and kill and work:...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哦，我有一个动物园，我有一个动物园，在我的肋骨里，在我的骨头下，在我的红瓣心脏下 - 我得到了别的东西：它是一颗男孩的心，一颗女人的心：它是父亲和母亲和情人：它来自上帝知道的地方：它要去上帝知道的地方 - 因为我是动物园的守护者：我说是和不：我唱歌，杀戮和工作：......

vocabulary.definition: n. 午前, 上午
vocabulary.context: and the mockingbird warbles in the early forenoon before the dew is gone, warbles in the underbrush of my Chattanoogas of hope, gushes over the blue Ozark foothills of my wishes - And I got the eagle and the mockingbird from the wilderness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 知更鸟在露水消失之前的清晨鸣叫，在我希望的查塔努加斯的灌木丛中鸣叫，在我愿望的蓝色奥扎克山麓上喷涌而出--我从荒野中得到了鹰和知更鸟

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 饥饿的加洛特大喊......

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 獠牙指向撕裂伤口......

vocabulary.definition: n. 爱人, 爱好者
vocabulary.context: ...under my red-valve heart - and I got something else: it is a man-child heart, a woman-child heart: it is a father and mother and lover: it came from God-Knows-Where: it is going to God-Knows-Where - For I am the keeper of the zoo: I say yes and no: I sing and kill and work: I am a pal of the world: I came from the wilderness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...在我的红瓣心脏下 - 我得到了别的东西：这是一颗男孩的心，一颗女人的心：它是父亲、母亲和情人：它来自上帝知道的地方：它要去上帝知道的地方 - 因为我是动物园的守护者：我说是和不：我唱歌、杀戮和工作：我是世界的朋友：我来自荒野

vocabulary.definition: adv. 正确地, 精确地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这次，她在简历中附上了一个真正的足球和一张纸条，上面写着："还有哪位四分卫能够准确地将球传出 386 英里？"这是从她的大学到 NFL 办公室的距离
