vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不仅如此，老鼠可以在许多人在建筑物中用作屋顶和地板覆盖物的稻草中繁衍生息

vocabulary.definition: n. 虱子, 寄生虫；[医] 虱
vocabulary.context: People often have to deal with another ectoparasite, as well, a species of louse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们经常不得不应对另一种体外寄生虫，即虱子

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 免除, 证明无罪；[法] 解放, 开释, 免罪
vocabulary.context: This study doesn't exonerate rats.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这项研究并没有为老鼠开脱

vocabulary.definition: n. 跳蚤；[医] 蚤
vocabulary.context: After all, their fleas can harbor the plague microbes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毕竟，它们的跳蚤可以携带鼠疫微生物

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 共存
vocabulary.context: Different species of these parasites are adapted to coexist with different animal hosts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些寄生虫的不同物种适应于与不同的动物宿主共存

vocabulary.definition: adj. 细菌的；[医] 细菌的, [无芽胞]杆菌的
vocabulary.context: This bacterial disease swept across Europe from 1346 to 1353, killing millions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种细菌性疾病从 1346 年到 1353 年席卷欧洲，造成数百万人死亡

vocabulary.definition: n. 传输, 传送, 变速器；[计] 传输
vocabulary.context: It most closely matched the patterns in death rates seen from human transmissions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它与人类传播的死亡率模式最接近

vocabulary.definition: adj. 同温层的
vocabulary.context: SOFIA (Stratospheric Observatory for Infrared Astronomy), or NASA's flying observatory, just completed a study of the star Epsilon Eridani (eps Eri) and its planetary system.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: SOFIA（平流层红外天文学观测站）或 NASA 的飞行观测站刚刚完成了对 Epsilon Eridani (eps Eri) 恒星及其行星系统的研究

vocabulary.definition: n. 圆盘, 磁盘；[计] 磁盘
vocabulary.context: But SOFIA confirmed that it's put together like ours, with debris disks like our asteroid belt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但索菲亚证实它的组合方式与我们的类似，碎片盘与我们的小行星带类似

vocabulary.definition: adj. 适于居住的, 可居住的
vocabulary.context: But perhaps what was even more exciting was that three of the seven planets could be habitable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但也许更令人兴奋的是七颗行星中的三颗可能适合居住

vocabulary.definition: n. 光年
vocabulary.context: Located about 10.5 light-years away, it's much younger than our solar system.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它距离我们约10.5光年，比我们的太阳系年轻得多

vocabulary.definition: adj. 红外线的；n. 红外线
vocabulary.context: SOFIA (Stratospheric Observatory for Infrared Astronomy), or NASA's flying observatory, just completed a study of the star Epsilon Eridani (eps Eri) and its planetary system.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: SOFIA（平流层红外天文学观测站）或 NASA 的飞行观测站刚刚完成了对 Epsilon Eridani (eps Eri) 恒星及其行星系统的研究

vocabulary.definition: n. 持续时间, 持续；[计] 持续时间
vocabulary.context: Being able to grow their own food while in space is one of the important steps for sustained and longer duration space missions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 能够在太空中种植自己的食物是持续和长期太空任务的重要步骤之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 莴苣, 生菜, 纸币；[医] 莴苣
vocabulary.context: It's not the first time that they've been successful at growing vegetables - they've grown lettuce before - but this is a first for cabbage!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这不是他们第一次成功种植蔬菜--他们以前种植过生菜--但这对卷心菜来说是第一次！

vocabulary.definition: n. 碎片, 残骸；[医] 碎屑
vocabulary.context: But SOFIA confirmed that it's put together like ours, with debris disks like our asteroid belt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但索菲亚证实它的组合方式与我们的类似，碎片盘与我们的小行星带类似

vocabulary.definition: n. 任务, 代表团, 使命, 传教团；v.t. 派遣, 向...传教
vocabulary.context: The purpose behind these experiments is to see if astronauts can stay in outer space for longer missions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些实验的目的是看看宇航员是否可以在外太空停留更长时间的任务

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高危险度的, 充满危险的
vocabulary.context: "I'm going to guess that lots of parents (perhaps most of them) wouldn't keep their kids out of hockey (or football or lacrosse or other high-risk sport) for a year after a concussion," Dr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我猜很多父母（也许是大多数）不会让他们的孩子在脑震荡后一年内不参加曲棍球（或足球、长曲棍球或其他高风险运动），"博士说

vocabulary.definition: n. 儿科医生, 儿科专家；[医] 儿科医师, 儿科学家
vocabulary.context: Claire McCarthy, a pediatrician at Boston Children's Hospital who wasn't involved in the research, writes on her blog.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 波士顿儿童医院的儿科医生克莱尔·麦卡锡（Claire McCarthy）没有参与这项研究，她在她的博客上写道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 继续的, 作为重复的
vocabulary.context: "It's really important that they get close follow-up care and make decisions based on what's best for the child."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他们得到密切的后续护理并根据对孩子最有利的方式做出决定非常重要。"

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 建立理论, 讲理论, 推理
vocabulary.context: That could be either because neurobiology changes as children mature, the researchers theorized, or that they are playing harder, with more contact and higher-force impacts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 研究人员推测，这可能是因为随着儿童成熟，神经生物学发生了变化，也可能是因为他们玩得更努力，接触更多，影响力更大

vocabulary.definition: n. 小儿科；[医] 儿科学
vocabulary.context: The study appears in the journal, Pediatrics .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该研究发表在儿科杂志上

vocabulary.definition: n. 指导路线, 方针, 指标；[经] 指导路线, 方针, 准则
vocabulary.context: Any athlete suspected of having a concussion should be removed from play immediately, according to guidelines issued earlier this year by the American Academy of Neurology.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据美国神经病学学会今年早些时候发布的指导方针，任何怀疑患有脑震荡的运动员都应立即退出比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 恢复, 复原, 痊愈, 重获；[计] 恢复
vocabulary.context: In the study, those age 13 and over were more likely to have a long recovery time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这项研究中，13 岁及以上的人更有可能有较长的恢复时间

vocabulary.definition: n. 医师, 内科医师, 解除痛苦者；[医] 主治医师
vocabulary.context: Matthew Eisenberg, the lead author of the study, who is an emergency room physician at Boston Children's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马修·艾森伯格（Matthew Eisenberg），该研究的主要作者，波士顿儿童医院的急诊室医生

vocabulary.definition: n. 同事, 同僚
vocabulary.context: The patients who had had a concussion in the year before being injured again had symptoms for almost three times as long as those with their first concussion, 35 days compared to 12 days, according to Eisenberg and his colleagues.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据艾森伯格和他的同事的说法，在再次受伤前的一年内遭受过脑震荡的患者的症状时间几乎是第一次脑震荡患者的三倍，分别为 35 天和 12 天

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不用语言的；不用动词的
vocabulary.context: He's nonverbal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他不说话

vocabulary.definition: n. 数学
vocabulary.context: People often associate autism with liking maths and science and nothing else, but I know so many autistic people who love being creative.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们经常将自闭症与喜欢数学和科学联系在一起，但我认识很多喜欢创造力的自闭症患者

vocabulary.definition: adv. 开玩笑地, 打趣地
vocabulary.context: [Jokingly:] They know.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: [开玩笑：]他们知道

vocabulary.definition: n. 谷壳, 糠, 揶揄；v. 开玩笑, 戏弄
vocabulary.context: But that's fine with me, because it sorts the wheat from the chaff, and I can find which people are genuine and true and I can pick these people as my friends.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这对我来说很好，因为它能从谷壳中筛选出麦子，我可以找到哪些人是真诚的，我可以选择这些人作为我的朋友

vocabulary.definition: adv. 说不清
vocabulary.context: School can be a problem in general, but having also to explain to a teacher on a daily basis that their lesson is inexplicably dull and you are secretly taking refuge in a world inside your head in which you are not in that lesson, that adds to your list of problems.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学校通常是一个问题，但每天还必须向老师解释他们的课程莫名其妙地枯燥，而你正在偷偷地躲在你头脑中的一个世界中，而你并不在这堂课中，这增加了你的问题清单

vocabulary.definition: n. 孤独症；[医] 孤独癖, 自我中心主义
vocabulary.context: People tend to diagnose autism with really specific check-box descriptions, but in reality, it's a whole variation as to what we're like.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们倾向于用非常具体的复选框描述来诊断自闭症，但实际上，我们的性格完全不同

vocabulary.definition: v. 诊断
vocabulary.context: People tend to diagnose autism with really specific check-box descriptions, but in reality, it's a whole variation as to what we're like.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们倾向于用非常具体的复选框描述来诊断自闭症，但实际上，我们的性格完全不同

vocabulary.definition: adj. 真正的, 真实的, 诚恳的；[医] 真性的
vocabulary.context: But that's fine with me, because it sorts the wheat from the chaff, and I can find which people are genuine and true and I can pick these people as my friends.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这对我来说很好，因为它能从谷壳中筛选出麦子，我可以找到哪些人是真诚的，我可以选择这些人作为我的朋友

vocabulary.definition: n. 能力, 才干；[经] 能力, 才能
vocabulary.context: One of the things I can do because I'm autistic - it's an ability rather than a disability - is I've got a very, very vivid imagination.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因为我是自闭症患者，所以我能做的一件事--这是一种能力而不是残疾--就是我有非常非常生动的想象力

vocabulary.definition: n. 实用主义；[法] 实用主义, 干涉主义, 独断
vocabulary.context: Hoose says he believes Colvin understands the pragmatism that pushed Parks to the fore, but "on the other hand, she did it."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 胡斯说，他相信科尔文理解推动帕克斯脱颖而出的实用主义，但"另一方面，她做到了"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 纠正的, 改正的, 矫正的；n. 改善法, 矫正物
vocabulary.context: At the same time, Garrow believes attention to Colvin is a healthy corrective, because "the real reality of the movement was often young people and often more than 50 percent women." The images you most often see are men in suits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与此同时，加罗认为对科尔文的关注是一种健康的纠正，因为"这场运动的真正现实往往是年轻人，而且往往超过 50% 是女性。"你最常看到的形象是西装革履的男人

vocabulary.definition: n. 原告, 起诉人；[经] 原告, 原起诉人
vocabulary.context: He also believes Colvin is important because she challenged the law in court, one of four women plaintiffs in Browder v.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他还认为科尔文很重要，因为她在法庭上挑战法律，是布劳德诉美国案的四名女性原告之一

vocabulary.definition: adv. 自愿地, 以自由意志
vocabulary.context: "All I remember is that I was not going to walk off the bus voluntarily," Colvin says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我只记得我不会自愿下车，"科尔文说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 内在地, 生来地, 固有地；[计] 固有的
vocabulary.context: She was well-known and respected and, says Garrow, Parks had a "natural gravitas" and was an "inherently impressive person."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 加罗说，帕克斯很有名，很受人尊敬，她有一种"天生的庄重感"，是一个"天生令人印象深刻的人"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自然的, 自发的, 未经琢磨的；[医] 自发的, 特发的, 自生的
vocabulary.context: and the Southern Christian Leadership Conference , says people may think that Parks' action was spontaneous, but black civic leaders had been thinking about what to do about the Montgomery buses for years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 和南方基督教领袖会议表示，人们可能认为帕克斯的行动是自发的，但黑人公民领袖多年来一直在思考如何处理蒙哥马利的公交车

vocabulary.definition: n. 综合, 与环境协调的行为, 集成；[化] 集成; 整合
vocabulary.context: In her new community, hardly anyone was talking about integration; instead, most people were talking about black enterprises, black power and Malcolm X.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在她的新社区中，几乎没有人谈论融合；相反，大多数人谈论的是黑人企业、黑人权力和马尔科姆·X

vocabulary.definition: adv. 成功, 结果良好, 有成就
vocabulary.context: Gayle , the court case that successfully overturned bus segregation laws in Montgomery and Alabama.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 盖尔（Gayle），成功推翻蒙哥马利和阿拉巴马州公交车隔离法的法庭案件

vocabulary.definition: n. 油脂, 动物脂油；v.t. 涂脂油于
vocabulary.context: By 2,300 B.C., soap was produced from tallow and ash and was in wide use.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到公元前 2,300 年，肥皂已由牛脂和灰制成，并被广泛使用

vocabulary.definition: adj. 日晒的, 被太阳晒得干而发硬的
vocabulary.context: The situation worsened so that, presently, the region which once was the lush paradise and cradle of civilization largely consists of dry, cracked plains of sunbaked clay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 情况变得更糟，以至于现在，这个曾经是郁郁葱葱的天堂和文明摇篮的地区主要由干燥、开裂的晒土平原组成

vocabulary.definition: n. 豆类, 豆荚；[医] 豆, [豆]荚
vocabulary.context: The unusually fertile soil of the region encouraged the further cultivation of wheat as well as rye, barley, and legumes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该地区异常肥沃的土壤鼓励进一步种植小麦以及黑麦、大麦和豆类

vocabulary.definition: prep. 大约在；[经] 大约
vocabulary.context: After the short-lived Roman annexation and occupation, the region was conquered by the Sassanid Persians (circa 226 A.D.) and, finally, by the Arabian Muslims in the 7th century A.D.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在短暂的罗马吞并和占领之后，该地区被萨珊波斯人（约公元 226 年）征服，最后在公元 7 世纪被阿拉伯穆斯林征服

vocabulary.definition: n. 都市化；[医] 都市化, 人口城市集中
vocabulary.context: Known as the Cradle of Civilization, the Fertile Crescent is regarded as the birthplace of agriculture, urbanization, writing, trade, science, history, and organized religion and was first populated around 10,000 B.C.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 新月沃土被称为文明的摇篮，被认为是农业、城市化、写作、贸易、科学、历史和有组织的宗教的发源地，最早在公元前 10,000 年左右就有人口居住

vocabulary.definition: n. 创办人, 家长, 元老, 教长, (天主教)教皇；[法] 家长, 族长, 创始人
vocabulary.context: that the biblical patriarch Abraham left his native city of Ur for the "promised land," carrying the tales and legends of Mesopotamia with him to in time appear, transformed, as biblical narratives.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 圣经中的族长亚伯拉罕离开了他的故乡乌尔城前往"应许之地"，带着美索不达米亚的故事和传说随着时间的推移，以圣经的叙述方式出现、转变

vocabulary.definition: n. 花瓶, 瓶
vocabulary.context: the image of the breed of dog known as the Saluki was appearing regularly on vases and other ceramics as well as wall paintings).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 萨路基犬的形象经常出现在花瓶和其他陶瓷以及壁画上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 短命的, 短暂的；[经] 短暂的
vocabulary.context: After the short-lived Roman annexation and occupation, the region was conquered by the Sassanid Persians (circa 226 A.D.) and, finally, by the Arabian Muslims in the 7th century A.D.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在短暂的罗马吞并和占领之后，该地区被萨珊波斯人（约公元 226 年）征服，最后在公元 7 世纪被阿拉伯穆斯林征服

vocabulary.definition: adj. 祭司的
vocabulary.context: Attention to one's person in terms of hygiene was stressed in that human beings were thought to have been created as help-mates to the gods, and so should make themselves presentable in the performance of their duties (this was especially so for the Priestly Class).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 强调对个人卫生的关注，因为人类被认为是作为神的助手而被创造的，因此在履行职责时应该让自己得体（对于祭司阶层尤其如此）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无法支撑的, 不能忍受的, 不可证实的；[法] 未能证实的, 不能成立的
vocabulary.context: As opposed to limiting the time of a fishing season-driving fishermen on a mad dash to make their living in a short time and use trawling or other unsustainable fishing methods to do it-catch shares foster communication and stewardship.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与限制捕鱼季节的时间驱使渔民在短时间内疯狂冲刺谋生并使用拖网或其他不可持续的捕鱼方法进行捕捞共享促进沟通和管理

vocabulary.definition: adj. 允许的, 许可的, 容许的；[经] 允许产量
vocabulary.context: A total allowable catch is established, using scientific data about the health of fish stocks and the environment in a certain area, and catch shares are licensed out to each fishing business telling them exactly how much of each seafood species they're allowed to catch.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利用有关特定区域鱼类种群健康状况和环境的科学数据确定了允许捕捞总量，并将捕捞份额许可给每个渔业企业，告诉他们可以捕捞每种海鲜品种的确切数量

vocabulary.definition: n. 拖网；v. 用拖网捕鱼
vocabulary.context: Trawling drags huge nets through the ocean that scoop up every animal and the ecosystem in its pathway, resulting in massive wasteful bycatch - dead fish are returned to the sea because they weren't the target fish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拖网捕鱼在海洋中拖着巨大的网，将其路径上的每一种动物和生态系统都卷走，导致大量浪费的副渔获物--死鱼被送回大海，因为它们不是目标鱼

vocabulary.definition: n. 污染物, 沾染物；[计] 污染物
vocabulary.context: We can avoid big fish, which have been overfished for years, like marlin, tuna and shark and eat small fish instead - 90% of the big fish are gone, they're important for the ecosystems, and they're also very often full of toxic contaminants like lead.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们可以避免捕捞多年来被过度捕捞的大鱼，如马林鱼、金枪鱼和鲨鱼，而吃小鱼--90%的大鱼都消失了，它们对生态系统很重要，而且它们通常还富含铅等有毒污染物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无效率的, 无能的；[医] 无效的, 无效力的
vocabulary.context: It is also an incredibly inefficient way to make food - requiring 6 pounds of wild caught animals to create 1 pound of salmon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这也是一种极其低效的食物生产方式--需要 6 磅野生捕获的动物才能生产 1 磅鲑鱼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 浪费的, 不经济的
vocabulary.context: Now we're facing an imminent and global collapse of our fisheries, projected to happen as early as 2048, thanks to overfishing, wasteful fishing practices and massive overconsumption.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，由于过度捕捞、浪费性捕捞方式和大规模过度消费，我们正面临着全球渔业即将崩溃，预计最早将在 2048 年发生

vocabulary.definition: n. 抵抗者, 反抗者；adj. 抵抗的, 反抗的, 耐...的
vocabulary.context: The trick is to scale these solutions up to a global scale, encouraging countries that have originally been resistant to helping and get them onboard, and supporting countries that don't have the means to update their fishing policies themselves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 关键在于将这些解决方案扩大到全球范围，鼓励那些原本拒绝提供帮助并让其加入的国家，并支持那些没有能力自行更新渔业政策的国家

vocabulary.definition: n. 智利；[化] 番椒; 辣椒
vocabulary.context: Bans like this in the waters of Alaska, Chile and elsewhere are being fought for by environmental organizations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 环保组织正在争取在阿拉斯加、智利和其他地方的水域实施此类禁令

vocabulary.definition: n. 弄脏者, 亵渎者
vocabulary.context: Egyptians believed that a defiler of a pharaoh's resting place would be cursed for eternity.

vocabulary.context: The Roman Senate consisted of approximately 600 members, all of whom had held one or more of the five major administrative positions: senator, consul, praetor, aedile, and quaestor.

vocabulary.definition: n. 刑事推事, 主管财务官吏

vocabulary.definition: n. 领事的职位, 领事的任期；[法] 领事的职位或任期
vocabulary.context: For these offices, as with the consulship, rules governed the number of years a citizen had to wait after completing one post before running for another.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于这些职位，与领事职位一样，规则规定了公民在完成一个职位后必须等待多少年才能竞选另一个职位

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非常重要的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宗教官员监督最重要的国家礼拜活动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 丰富的, 富裕的；n. 支流, 富人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着，在不太富裕群体的成员投票之前，可能的全部选票中的大多数都可以进行投票和计票

vocabulary.definition: n. 下部结构, 路基, 基础；[化] 子结构; 底部结构
vocabulary.context: Deep within this substructure were complex storage vaults that businesspeople and moneychangers used in much the same way as we do banks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个底层结构的深处是复杂的存储金库，商人和货币兑换商的使用方式与我们银行的使用方式大致相同

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几乎所有的牙齿都是成年人的臼齿

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许他们来牙医那里购买存放在商店罐子里的止痛药，但他们的蛀牙需要立即治疗

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 排水沟中的发现是迄今为止我们所掌握的古罗马牙科的最佳考古证据

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 挖掘机首先在地板上发现了罗马人用来装急救药膏和药品的小罐子

vocabulary.definition: n. 论坛, 公开讨论的广场, 法庭, 讨论会；[法] 讨论会, 专题讨论, 公共论坛

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个被称为罗马广场的地区的商业看起来与当今任何城市的商业非常相似

vocabulary.definition: n. 存储器, 储藏, 保管, 库存, 仓库；[计] 存放处; 存储

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗马人确实在这些寺庙里崇拜他们的神，但任何大寺庙的 25 或 30 个帐幕中的各种商店看起来一定很像现代购物中心

More water circulation increases aeration of the host anemone tentacles and benefits the metabolism of both partners, mainly by increasing anemone body size and both clownfish and anemone respiration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...海葵触手通过某些行为和运动，例如"楔入"和"切换"。更多的水循环增加了宿主海葵触手的通气量，并有利于双方的新陈代谢，主要是通过增加海葵的体型以及小丑鱼和海葵的呼吸

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 排泄, 分泌；[医] 排泄, 分泌
vocabulary.context: The nitrogen excreted from clownfish increases the amount of algae incorporated into the tissue of their hosts, which aids the anemone in tissue growth and regeneration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小丑鱼排出的氮增加了融入宿主组织的藻类数量，这有助于海葵的组织生长和再生

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小丑鱼排出的氮增加了融入宿主组织的藻类数量，这有助于海葵的组织生长和再生

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...海葵触手并有利于双方的新陈代谢，主要是通过增加海葵的体型以及小丑鱼和海葵的呼吸

vocabulary.context: ...movements such as "wedging" and "switching." More water circulation increases aeration of the host anemone tentacles and benefits the metabolism of both partners, mainly by increasing anemone body size and both clownfish and anemone respiration.

vocabulary.context: The sea anemone protects the clownfish from predators, and provides food through the scraps left from the anemone's meals and occasional dead anemone tentacles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海葵保护小丑鱼免受捕食者的侵害，并通过海葵进食时留下的残渣和偶尔死去的海葵触手提供食物

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然战争给了许多白人女性工作的机会，但直到 1943 年黑人男性才开始被雇用，直到 1945 年黑人女性才开始接受焊工培训

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 铆工罗西这个想法代表了二战期间在工厂、造船厂和其他制造工厂工作以帮助美国战争的所有美国女性

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当时，高级女性工作被认为是不合适的，所以铆工罗西被制作成展示一个女性女性，她只因为她的国家需要她而工作

vocabulary.context: Today we can see the evil deeds Hitler committed as warnings for our own beliefs and political leaders - Hitler has shown what can happen when we obsess about our own power and blame others for the problems we face.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 希特勒钦佩日本和意大利等强大的民族主义政府，并在 20 世纪 30 年代末与这两个国家建立了军事联盟

vocabulary.definition: n. 水彩颜料, 水彩画

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他两次向艺术学校申请绘画，均被拒绝；然而，他能够出售维也纳著名景点的水彩画

vocabulary.definition: adj. 意志坚强的
vocabulary.context: He had a very tense relationship with his father because they were both stubborn and strong-willed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他和父亲的关系非常紧张，因为他们都很固执、意志坚强

vocabulary.definition: n. 违约, 不履行责任, 缺席, 默认值；v. 疏怠职责, 缺席, 拖欠, 默认；[计] 默认; 默认值; 缺省值
vocabulary.context: He was now, by default, a dictator.

vocabulary.definition: n. 国家主义者, 民族主义者
vocabulary.context: However, he was intrigued by the party's nationalist and anti-Semitic views.

vocabulary.definition: n. 优越, 高傲；[化] 优越性
vocabulary.context: He rose to power during a time of crisis in Germany, and his cruel, violent legacy is often seen as a warning to the rest of the world of what can happen when someone is too obsessed with national pride and racial superiority.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在德国危机时期上台，他残酷、暴力的遗产常常被视为对世界其他国家的警告：当一个人过于沉迷于民族自豪感和种族优越感时会发生什么

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大名鼎鼎的

vocabulary.definition: n. [总称]电视观众
vocabulary.context: Looking this closely, it appears as if the Committee is trying to get rid of the smaller schools as fast as they can despite the impact they have made on the tournament and its viewership.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 仔细观察，委员会似乎正试图尽快摆脱规模较小的学校，尽管它们对锦标赛及其收视率产生了影响

vocabulary.definition: n. 斗败了的狗, 失败者, 受害者；[法] 受压迫者, 在不健全的社会的受害者
vocabulary.context: The appeal of the underdog, which grew when the tournament expanded to 32 teams in 1975 and 64 teams in 1985, has proven powerful at attracting fans and viewers ever since.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1975 年赛事规模扩大到 32 支球队，1985 年扩大到 64 支球队，弱旅的吸引力随之增强，事实证明，自那以后，弱旅对球迷和观众的吸引力不断增强

vocabulary.definition: n. 支架, 括弧, 托架；v.t. 装托架, 括入括弧；[计] 方括号; 括号
vocabulary.context: In addition to the millions of fans who tune in, millions more fill out their "brackets" trying to predict the winners of the games.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了数百万收看比赛的球迷之外，还有数百万人填写他们的"括号"，试图预测比赛的获胜者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 东南方的
vocabulary.context: The majority of these spots go to teams from the six major conferences, or so-called "power conferences," in men's basketball: the Atlantic Coast Conference (ACC), the Big East, the Big Ten, the Big 12, the Pac 12, and the Southeastern Conference (SEC).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些席位中的大多数都属于男子篮球六大联盟（即所谓的"权力联盟"）的球队：大西洋海岸联盟（ACC）、大东联盟、大十联盟、大十二联盟、太平洋十二联盟和东南联盟（SEC）

vocabulary.definition: num. 二十一, 二十一个；n. 二十一, 二十一个, 二十一点牌戏
vocabulary.context: Twenty-one power conference schools were selected despite losing at least half of their games against conference opponents.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管在与联盟对手的比赛中输掉了至少一半的比赛，但还是有二十一所联盟学校被选中

vocabulary.definition: n. 选择, 选文, 精选品；[医] 选择, 淘汰
vocabulary.context: The NCAA selection committee (the Committee) then chooses 36 "at-large" teams based on their play during the regular season.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: NCAA选拔委员会（委员会）随后根据常规赛期间的表现选出36支"普通"球队

vocabulary.definition: n. 现象, 迹象, 表现, 奇迹, 奇才；[化] 现象
vocabulary.context: But the NCAA men's tournament has not always been the phenomenon it is today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但 NCAA 男子锦标赛并不总是像今天这样

vocabulary.definition: n. 多数, 大半；[计] 多数逻辑
vocabulary.context: The majority of these spots go to teams from the six major conferences, or so-called "power conferences," in men's basketball: the Atlantic Coast Conference (ACC), the Big East, the Big Ten, the Big 12, the Pac 12, and the Southeastern Conference (SEC).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些席位中的大多数都属于男子篮球六大联盟（即所谓的"权力联盟"）的球队：大西洋海岸联盟（ACC）、大东联盟、大十联盟、大十二联盟、太平洋十二联盟和东南联盟（SEC）

vocabulary.definition: n. [生化]阿朴脂蛋白
vocabulary.context: That's short for apolipoprotein E (AY-poh-lih-poh-PRO-teen E).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是载脂蛋白 E (AY-poh-lih-poh-PRO-teen E) 的缩写

vocabulary.definition: n. 烟囱；[机] 烟堆
vocabulary.context: Both can be spewed by traffic and industrial smokestacks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两者都可以通过交通和工业烟囱喷出

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不用加工的，直接使用的; 非劳动力的; 不为报酬的，无报酬的
vocabulary.context: Those with nonworking air purifiers had higher levels of stress hormones in their blood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那些使用不起作用的空气净化器的人血液中的应激激素水平较高

vocabulary.definition: n. 变动, 波动, 动摇；[化] 涨落; 起伏; 波动; 脉动
vocabulary.context: Such fluctuations could lead to similar day-to-day changes in how a child's brain functions, says Jordi Sunyer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Jordi Sunyer 表示，这种波动可能会导致儿童大脑功能发生类似的日常变化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 元素的, 基本的
vocabulary.context: Nitrogen dioxide and soot (elemental carbon).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 二氧化氮和烟灰（元素碳）

vocabulary.definition: n. 反常, 畸形, 变态；[化] 反常; 非正态性
vocabulary.context: Some elderly dogs can develop brain abnormalities seen in people with Alzheimer's disease.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些老年狗可能会出现阿尔茨海默病患者所见的大脑异常

vocabulary.definition: n. 薄膜, 膜, 羊皮纸；[化] 膜; 隔膜
vocabulary.context: The oxygen you breathe passes from the lungs through a thin membrane.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你呼吸的氧气通过一层薄膜从肺部排出

vocabulary.definition: n. 症状, 征候, 征兆；[医] 症状
vocabulary.context: Alzheimer's symptoms usually show up in old age.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿尔茨海默病的症状通常在老年时出现。 【06】我是不是已经不再年轻了，还处于半完美状态？

vocabulary.definition: n. 介绍；[计] 简介
vocabulary.context: Then she took her first intro class - and found that most of her male classmates were way ahead of her because they'd grown up playing with computers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她参加了第一堂入门课，发现她的大多数男同学都远远领先于她，因为他们是玩电脑长大的

vocabulary.definition: n. 技师, 技术员
vocabulary.context: It helped define who geeks were, and it created techie culture.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它帮助定义了极客，并创造了技术文化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可互换的；[化] 可互换的
vocabulary.context: And the plot summaries are almost interchangeable: awkward geek boy genius uses tech savvy to triumph over adversity and win the girl.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 情节摘要几乎可以互换：笨拙的极客男孩天才利用技术悟性战胜了逆境并赢得了女孩的芳心

vocabulary.definition: n. 讨厌的人；呆子
vocabulary.context: Movies like Weird Science, Revenge of the Nerds and War Games all came out in the '80s.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《怪异科学》、《书呆子的复仇》和《战争游戏》等电影都出现在 80 年代

vocabulary.definition: n. 摘要, 概要；adj. 摘要的, 简略的；[计] 摘要; 概要
vocabulary.context: And the plot summaries are almost interchangeable: awkward geek boy genius uses tech savvy to triumph over adversity and win the girl.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 情节摘要几乎可以互换：笨拙的极客男孩天才利用技术悟性战胜了逆境并赢得了女孩的芳心

vocabulary.definition: n. 节目, 节目单, 程序, 纲要, 大纲, 计划；v.t. 规划, 拟...计划；v.i. 安排节目, 编程序
vocabulary.context: A lot of computing pioneers - the people who programmed the first digital computers - were women.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多计算机先驱--第一台数字计算机的编程者--都是女性

vocabulary.definition: adj. 技术上的, 专门的, 工业的, 严格根据法律的；[化] 技巧
vocabulary.context: The percentage of women in computer science flattened, and then plunged, even as the share of women in other technical and professional fields kept rising.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管其他技术和专业领域的女性比例不断上升，但计算机科学领域的女性比例却持平，然后大幅下降

vocabulary.definition: n. 叙述, 故事；adj. 叙述的, 叙事的, 故事体的
vocabulary.context: This idea that computers are for boys became a narrative.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "计算机是男孩的专利"这一想法成为了一种叙事

vocabulary.definition: adv. 逐渐地, 渐增地
vocabulary.context: As personal computers became more common, computer science professors increasingly assumed that their students had grown up playing with computers at home.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着个人电脑变得越来越普遍，计算机科学教授越来越多地认为他们的学生是在家里玩电脑长大的

vocabulary.definition: n. [植]桂足香,桂香香水, 局外人
vocabulary.context: BURKE: You can be a wallflower or a social butterfly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯克：你可以是壁花，也可以是交际花

vocabulary.definition: adj. 打扰的, 插入的；[法] 闯入的, 侵入的, 干涉的
vocabulary.context: And as he moves into adulthood, Facebook has started to feel intrusive.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着他进入成年期，Facebook 开始让他感到侵扰

vocabulary.definition: n. 吃嫩叶的动物, 浏览书本的人；[计] 浏览程序
vocabulary.context: In a study she did when she was at Carnegie Mellon University, she found big differences between browsers and active users.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在卡内基梅隆大学时进行的一项研究中，她发现浏览器和活跃用户之间存在巨大差异

vocabulary.definition: n. 觉醒, 清醒
vocabulary.context: But as NPR's Patti Neighmond reports, there are growing signs of disenchantment with the site.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但正如 NPR 的 Patti Neighmond 报道的那样，越来越多的迹象表明人们对该网站不再抱有幻想

vocabulary.definition: pron. 某事；某物；n. 重要的人；值得重视的事；adv. 非常；有点；大约；adj. 大约；有点象
vocabulary.context: Teens and early 20-somethings are its biggest users.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 青少年和 20 岁出头的人是其最大的用户

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 撤消遣散, 复员, 使无效, 使不活动
vocabulary.context: I'm 23 years old and I deactivated my Facebook account about a month ago.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我今年 23 岁，大约一个月前停用了我的 Facebook 帐户

vocabulary.definition: adv. 面对面
vocabulary.context: NEIGHMOND: Burke says it's a lot like face-to-face life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 内蒙德：伯克说这很像面对面的生活

vocabulary.definition: n. (大学)二年级生；adj. 二年级学生的, 二年级的
vocabulary.context: PATTI NEIGHMOND, BYLINE: Genevieve Brown is 19 years old, a sophomore at New York's Sarah Lawrence College and an avid Facebook user since junior high.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帕蒂·内蒙德连线：吉纳维芙·布朗今年 19 岁，是纽约莎拉·劳伦斯学院的二年级学生，从初中起就是 Facebook 的狂热用户

vocabulary.definition: n. 年长女伴；v.t. 伴护
vocabulary.context: And outside of the clusters were chaperons, ready to step in if they saw any grinding or suggestive dancing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 集群外面有监护人，如果他们看到任何磨蹭或暗示性的舞蹈，他们就准备介入

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可理解的
vocabulary.context: Ira Glass: There are rules like this at all the dances, and some more comprehensible than others.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Ira Glass：所有的舞蹈都有这样的规则，有些比其他的更容易理解

vocabulary.definition: adj. 系带的；n. 系带靴（或鞋）
vocabulary.context: They're ankle-high, lace-up moccasins.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们是及踝高的系带莫卡辛鞋

vocabulary.definition: n. 女孩子, 女人腔的男人, 胆小鬼；adj. 女人腔的
vocabulary.context: But then she also was made fun of for not smoking, for being too much of a sissy to start smoking.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但后来她也因为不吸烟而被嘲笑，因为她太娘娘腔而不敢吸烟

vocabulary.definition: n. 薄纱, 纱布, 金属网；[医] 纱布
vocabulary.context: Hovering outside one of the clusters was a teacher named John Gauze, and he looked perplexed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位名叫约翰·高兹（John Gauze）的老师在其中一个集群外盘旋，他看上去很困惑

vocabulary.definition: adv. 漫无目的地, 无目标地
vocabulary.context: Older kids dancing in the middle, younger kids at the periphery, a few aimlessly wandering around, looking like they're not sure what to do.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 年长的孩子在中间跳舞，年幼的孩子在外围跳舞，还有一些漫无目的地闲逛，看起来不知道该做什么

vocabulary.definition: n. 耻辱, 丢脸, 谦卑
vocabulary.context: Ethan: I'm hoping nothing bad happens, like no humiliation or not something that'll be a story for the next month or two.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伊森：我希望没有什么不好的事情发生，比如没有羞辱或者不会成为未来一两个月的故事

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 投入于, 献身
vocabulary.context: But in all the time I've listened to your show, I've never heard an episode devoted to what goes on inside the walls of a middle school.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但在我听你的节目的所有时间里，我从未听过专门讲述中学围墙内发生的事情的一集

vocabulary.definition: n. 驼背；[医] 驼背, 脊柱后突
vocabulary.context: In Tanzania and Ghana, belief in the magical powers of albinos and hunchbacks has reportedly led to a rash of killings this year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据报道，在坦桑尼亚和加纳，对白化病患者和驼背人神奇力量的信仰导致今年发生了一系列杀戮事件

vocabulary.definition: adj. 岛的, 岛民的, 与世隔绝的, 孤立的, 保守的；[医] 岛的, 胰岛的, 脑岛的
vocabulary.context: It is rare for people in this insular farming community to testify against one another, for fear of revenge attacks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个与世隔绝的农业社区里，人们很少互相作证，因为担心遭到报复袭击

vocabulary.definition: adj. 燃烧的, 象燃烧一样的；n. 烧, 燃烧
vocabulary.context: The authorities say they have arrested more than 100 people in the burnings, but whether they will successfully prosecute any of the suspects is unclear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当局表示，他们已逮捕了 100 多人参与焚烧事件，但是否能成功起诉任何嫌疑人尚不清楚

vocabulary.definition: n. 放血；[医] 放血
vocabulary.context: For 40 years, Nyakundi has been using herbs and a little bloodletting to shield his customers from being bewitched.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 40 年来，Nyakundi 一直使用草药和一点放血来保护他的顾客不被迷惑

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 割断手足, 支解, 分割
vocabulary.context: Enoch Obiero, a Pentecostal minister, says the mob came to his door and dismembered his wife, a retired schoolteacher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 五旬节派牧师伊诺克·奥比罗 (Enoch Obiero) 说，暴民来到他家门口，肢解了他的妻子（一位退休教师）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 接著发生的
vocabulary.context: The ensuing riot killed more than a dozen people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后发生的骚乱造成十几人死亡

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 施魔法于, 蛊惑, 使着迷
vocabulary.context: For 40 years, Nyakundi has been using herbs and a little bloodletting to shield his customers from being bewitched.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 40 年来，Nyakundi 一直使用草药和一点放血来保护他的顾客不被迷惑

vocabulary.definition: n. 巫术, 魔法, 魔力
vocabulary.context: In much of Africa, people believe in some form of witchcraft.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在非洲大部分地区，人们相信某种形式的巫术

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不易了解的, 不清楚的, 含混的
vocabulary.context: The authorities say they have arrested more than 100 people in the burnings, but whether they will successfully prosecute any of the suspects is unclear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当局表示，他们已逮捕了 100 多人参与焚烧事件，但是否能成功起诉任何嫌疑人尚不清楚

vocabulary.definition: adj. 轶事的, 爱谈奇闻轶事的, 多轶事的
vocabulary.context: But when it comes to inter-species yawning, you can collect your own anecdotal data.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是当谈到跨物种打哈欠时，你可以收集自己的轶事数据

vocabulary.definition: adj. 周围的；n. 周围环境
vocabulary.context: More recently, consensus moved toward the idea that yawning cools down the brain, so when ambient conditions and temperature of the brain itself increase, yawning episodes increase.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最近，人们普遍认为打哈欠可以使大脑降温，因此当环境条件和大脑本身温度升高时，打哈欠的次数就会增加

vocabulary.definition: n. 代理, 代理人, 委托书；[经] 代理人, 代表权, 授权书
vocabulary.context: They found that some dogs that yawned when exposed to human yawning had elevated cortisol levels - a proxy for stress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们发现，一些在人类打哈欠的情况下打哈欠的狗的皮质醇水平升高，这是压力的代表

vocabulary.definition: n. 皮质醇, 氢化可的松；[化] 皮质醇; 皮质甾醇; 氢化可的松
vocabulary.context: They found that some dogs that yawned when exposed to human yawning had elevated cortisol levels - a proxy for stress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们发现，一些在人类打哈欠的情况下打哈欠的狗的皮质醇水平升高，这是压力的代表

vocabulary.definition: n. 犬齿, 犬；adj. 犬的, 似犬的, 犬科的
vocabulary.context: In 2013, cognitive and behavioral scientists at the University of Tokyo once again tested contagious yawning in canines while controlling for stress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2013年，东京大学的认知和行为科学家再次在控制压力的情况下测试了犬类打哈欠的传染性

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易受影响的, 易感动的, 容许...的；[法] 易感的, 易受影响的, 容许
vocabulary.context: Research on humans tells us that people who are more empathetic tend to be more susceptible to contagious yawning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对人类的研究告诉我们，更有同理心的人往往更容易受到传染性哈欠的影响

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多洞穴的
vocabulary.context: A yawn consists of an extended gaping of the mouth followed by a more rapid closure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 打哈欠的过程是嘴巴张大，随后又快速闭合

vocabulary.definition: adj. 触染性的, 会蔓延的；[医] (接)触(传)染的
vocabulary.context: And that wide-open mouth can be contagious, especially in social species such as humans, chimpanzees, bonobos, macaques, and wolves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 张开的嘴可能会传染，尤其是在人类、黑猩猩、倭黑猩猩、猕猴和狼等社会物种中

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 结束, 作结论, 推断；v.i. 结束, 推断
vocabulary.context: They concluded that dogs can "catch" a yawn from humans and that yawning is a social rather than a stress-based behavior.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们得出的结论是，狗可以"捕捉到"人类的哈欠，而且打哈欠是一种社交行为，而不是基于压力的行为

vocabulary.definition: n. 卧房, 卧室, 寝室
vocabulary.context: Tansen was soon entertaining the emperor to sleep, and just as the sun rose over the hills and kissed the earth, Tansen would be in the emperor's bedchamber, singing ever so softly to slowly awaken him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很快，坦森就哄皇帝入睡了，当太阳从山上升起，亲吻大地时，坦森就会在皇帝的寝宫里，轻轻地唱着歌，慢慢地叫醒他

vocabulary.definition: n. 拉格（印度教的一种传统曲调）( raga的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: It was said that he could summon all the animals of the forest with his compassionate ragas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据说他可以用慈悲的拉伽召唤森林里的所有动物

vocabulary.definition: adv. 担心地；焦虑地
vocabulary.context: She looked worriedly at Tansen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她担忧地看着坦森

vocabulary.definition: n. 罗望子, 罗望子的果实；[医] 罗晃子
vocabulary.context: If you look upon a small grassy hill in the northern part of India today, you will see a small tamarind tree.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你今天观察印度北部的一座长满草的小山，你会看到一棵小罗望子树

vocabulary.definition: adj. 干枯的, 枯萎的, 干瘪的, 消瘦的
vocabulary.context: It has been said that anyone who eats a pale green leaf from this wizened tree and then touches the tomb will be graced with the gift of song.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据说，任何人如果吃了这棵干枯树上的淡绿色叶子，然后触摸坟墓，就会获得歌曲的恩赐

vocabulary.definition: n. 全体随行人员, 陪同人员
vocabulary.context: So pleased was the emperor that he completely forgot about the tiger and summoned his royal entourage to find who had sung so magically.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 皇帝非常高兴，完全忘记了老虎，并召集了他的皇室随从来寻找谁唱得如此神奇

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未点燃的, 无灯光的
vocabulary.context: The lamps upon the walls stood unlit, and the guests sat in darkness as they waited in anticipation to hear the most difficult raga ever sung.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 墙上的灯没有点亮，客人们坐在黑暗中，期待着听到有史以来最难的拉格演唱

vocabulary.definition: n. 昏睡状态, 恍惚, 着迷；v.t. 使恍惚, 使发呆
vocabulary.context: He lay down upon the tall grass, as if in a trance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他躺在高高的草地上，仿佛处于恍惚状态

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未触摸过的, 未改变的, 未受影响的
vocabulary.context: But the fire of Deepak Raga had not left Tansen untouched.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但 Deepak Raga 之火并没有让 Tansen 毫发无伤

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 落下, 偶然发现；adj. 点着的
vocabulary.context: They suggested that if he was indeed as good as they had heard, he should sing Deepak Raga for the court - if this song was sung to perfection, it was said that lamps would alight, and the singer's body would be consumed by fire and turn to ash.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们建议，如果他确实如他们所听到的那么好，他应该为宫廷演唱《Deepak Raga》--如果这首歌唱得完美，据说灯会点亮，歌手的身体会被火吞噬，化为灰烬

vocabulary.definition: n. 美术爱好者
vocabulary.context: For example, an animal-lover could rescue a bird, an art-lover could donate to a gallery or a retired teacher could volunteer at an after-school group.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，动物爱好者可以拯救一只鸟，艺术爱好者可以向画廊捐款，或者退休教师可以在课外团体中担任志愿者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 双行道的, 两路的, 相互的
vocabulary.context: This makes it a wonderful two-way relationship which just keeps giving.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这使其成为一种美妙的双向关系，并且不断给予

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不顾自己的, 无私的
vocabulary.context: Some think kindness is something completely selfless that we do out of love and care, while others believe it is just a tool that we cunningly use to become more popular and reap the benefits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人认为仁慈是我们出于爱和关怀而完全无私的事情，而另一些人则认为它只是我们狡猾地用来变得更受欢迎并获得利益的一种工具

vocabulary.definition: phr. 愉悦感, 对未来的乐观态度（新闻用语）；adj. （电影）令人愉悦的
vocabulary.context: The feel-good emotion from helping has been termed "warm glow" and the activity we see in the striatum is the likely biological basis of that feeling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帮助带来的感觉良好的情绪被称为"温暖的光芒"，我们在纹状体中看到的活动可能是这种感觉的生物学基础

vocabulary.definition: adv. 巧妙地, 狡猾地
vocabulary.context: Some think kindness is something completely selfless that we do out of love and care, while others believe it is just a tool that we cunningly use to become more popular and reap the benefits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人认为仁慈是我们出于爱和关怀而完全无私的事情，而另一些人则认为它只是我们狡猾地用来变得更受欢迎并获得利益的一种工具

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使活动, 使激活, 正式建成；v.i. 有活力
vocabulary.context: We know that deciding to be generous or cooperating with others activates an area of the brain called the striatum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们知道，决定慷慨或与他人合作会激活大脑中称为纹状体的区域

vocabulary.definition: n. 人道主义者, 博爱者, 基督凡人论者；adj. 人道主义的, 博爱的, 凡人论的
vocabulary.context: Although this effect is especially powerful for people we are close to, it can even apply to humanitarian problems such as poverty or climate change.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然这种影响对于我们亲近的人来说尤其强大，但它甚至也适用于贫困或气候变化等人道主义问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 屠夫, 尖刀, 刺, 芒, 尖物, 携带尖刀者, 张贴物, 滞销品, (非正式)难题；[经] 呆滞商品

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许是因为谷仓里没有其他骑手，萨迪感到一丝孤独，并因为她最好的朋友幸运就在那里而感到欣慰

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 接下来是马鞍，但情况还不错。我的主人非常温柔地将它放在我的背上，而老丹尼尔则抱着我的头。然后他把腰带系在我的身下，一直拍着我，跟我说话。然后我吃了一些燕麦，然后又吃了一点。他每天都这样做，直到我开始寻找燕麦和马鞍

vocabulary.context: All but three people were acquitted, and Phips eventually pardoned those three people in May 1693.

vocabulary.definition: n. 清教徒；adj. 清教徒的
vocabulary.context: Thomas Maule was a Quaker and a Salem Town resident who took issue with the Puritans' handling of the trials.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 托马斯·莫尔 (Thomas Maule) 是贵格会教徒，也是塞勒姆镇居民，他对清教徒对审判的处理提出了异议

vocabulary.definition: adj. 光谱的, 鬼怪的, 幻觉的；[医] 光谱的
vocabulary.context: It questioned relying exclusively on spectral evidence to convict a person of witchcraft.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它质疑完全依靠光谱证据来判定一个人施行巫术

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 判刑, 责备, 谴责；[法] 定罪, 判刑, 宣告有罪
vocabulary.context: It claimed that God would condemn the leaders of the Court of Oyer and Terminer for putting innocent people to death.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它声称上帝会谴责奥耶法院和特米纳法院的领导人杀害无辜者

vocabulary.definition: adj. polyrhythm的变形
vocabulary.context: Enslaved people also kept alive the polyrhythmic music of their native homelands.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 被奴役的人们还保留了他们故乡的多节奏音乐

vocabulary.definition: n. 省略中间的音节, 中略
vocabulary.context: Using traditional African features of percussion, syncopation, and improvisation, enslaved people also composed new music.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奴隶们还利用打击乐、切分音和即兴创作等非洲传统特色创作了新音乐

vocabulary.definition: n. 曼博舞, 曼博音乐；v.i. 跳曼博舞
vocabulary.context: Afro-Cuban mambo, Afro-Brazilian samba, Argentine tango, and many other musical forms and dances that are referred to as "Latin" have their roots in the rhythms and instruments introduced to the Americas by Africans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 非洲裔古巴曼波、非洲裔巴西桑巴、阿根廷探戈以及许多其他被称为"拉丁"的音乐形式和舞蹈都源于非洲人引入美洲的节奏和乐器

vocabulary.definition: n. 桑巴舞；v.i. 跳桑巴舞
vocabulary.context: Afro-Cuban mambo, Afro-Brazilian samba, Argentine tango, and many other musical forms and dances that are referred to as "Latin" have their roots in the rhythms and instruments introduced to the Americas by Africans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 非洲裔古巴曼波、非洲裔巴西桑巴、阿根廷探戈以及许多其他被称为"拉丁"的音乐形式和舞蹈都源于非洲人引入美洲的节奏和乐器

vocabulary.definition: n. 块茎, 突起, 结节；[医] 结节; 块茎(植物)
vocabulary.context: West African fufu, made of mashed yams or other tubers topped with boiled vegetables, is made with plantains in the Caribbean.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 西非的fufu，由捣碎的山药或其他块茎制成，上面撒上煮熟的蔬菜，是用加勒比地区的车前草制成的

vocabulary.definition: n. 混杂语言, 混杂行话, 事务
vocabulary.context: Known as pidgin dialects, they soon colored the pronunciation, vocabulary, and idioms used by the free people around them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们被称为洋泾浜方言，很快就给周围的自由人使用的发音、词汇和习语赋予了色彩

vocabulary.definition: n. 自我表现
vocabulary.context: It was a means of self-expression and part of religious rituals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它是一种自我表达的方式，也是宗教仪式的一部分

vocabulary.definition: n. 什锦菜肴
vocabulary.context: It is also known for jambalaya, which is made with rice, vegetables, and shrimp.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它也以什锦饭而闻名，它是用大米、蔬菜和虾制成的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 黑眼珠的, 黑眼圈的
vocabulary.context: Akaraje, which are fritters made of black-eyed peas and filled with spicy shrimp, are a popular street food in Brazil.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Akaraje 是一种用黑眼豌豆制成的油条，里面填满辣虾，是巴西流行的街头食品

vocabulary.definition: n. 大杂烩
vocabulary.context: Louisiana is famous for gumbo, a stew with meats or fish and okra.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 路易斯安那州以秋葵浓汤而闻名，这是一种肉或鱼和秋葵的炖菜

vocabulary.definition: n. 日本瘪三

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他看起来就像是黑帮成员

vocabulary.definition: adj. 校内的, 内部的；[医] 壁内的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 八年级的一天，我传球达阵，我们输掉了一场大型校内足球比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 活梯；[机] 梯子, 脚踏凳, 架梯

vocabulary.contextTranslation: Kong现在正在梯子上拧开烧坏的灯泡

vocabulary.definition: n. 驱魔的人, 召魂者

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久前的一天，我拜访了一位驱魔师

vocabulary.definition: n. 履行, 无罪开释；[经] (债务的)清偿

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 恭喜你最近被无罪释放？

vocabulary.definition: n. 催促者, 拉客的人, 骗子；[法] 乱推乱挤的人, 非法赚钱的
vocabulary.context: I'm a pool hustler and the Lemon Tree Billiards House is my turf.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我是一名台球骗子，柠檬树台球馆是我的地盘

vocabulary.definition: n. 叮当声, 叮叮声；v. (使)发叮叮声
vocabulary.context: "It can make simple tings difficult and difficult tings simple."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "它可以使简单的事情变得困难，也可以使困难的事情变得简单。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 五十几, 五十年代( fifty的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: He was an old Hawaiian man in his late forties or early fifties, recommended to me by a friend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是一位四十岁或五十岁出头的夏威夷老人，是朋友推荐给我的

vocabulary.definition: n. 夏威夷细面汤； （配日本菜用的）夏威夷细面
vocabulary.context: I'd burned my finger cooking saimin and couldn't get a good grip on the cue stick.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我在煮赛民时烧伤了手指，无法很好地握住球杆

vocabulary.definition: n. <日>炸肉排
vocabulary.context: I looked at Locust real fast, and he stared at me like a starving man sizing up a Diner's chicken katsu plate lunch.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我很快地看着 Locust，他盯着我，就像一个饥饿的人在打量餐厅的炸鸡排午餐

vocabulary.definition: adj. 惊愕的, 吓呆的, 遭雷击的
vocabulary.context: She fell back in her chair, thunderstruck with my boldness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她向后靠在椅子上，对我的大胆感到震惊

vocabulary.definition: n. 买卖约定者, 交易者；[经] 卖主
vocabulary.context: I shrank back into myself like a low-down bargainer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我像一个卑鄙的讨价还价者一样缩回自己

vocabulary.definition: n. 信心；肯定
vocabulary.context: Never before in my life did I ever see a man with such a sureness in his step, such power in his face, such friendly positiveness in his eye as when he smiled upon us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我一生中从来没有见过一个人，他的脚步如此坚定，他的脸上充满力量，他的眼神如此友好，积极，就像他对我们微笑时一样。 【07】从来不曾津津乐道仙力

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未说出的
vocabulary.context: The hidden sap of centuries would find release; colors that never saw light - songs that died unvoiced - romance that never had a chance to blossom in the black life of the Old World.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几个世纪以来隐藏的汁液将得到释放；从未见过光明的色彩--无声消逝的歌曲--在旧世界的黑人生活中从未有机会绽放的浪漫

vocabulary.definition: n. 客迈拉(狮头、羊身、蛇尾的吐火女怪), 假想的妖怪, 妄想；[医] 嵌合体
vocabulary.context: I felt that the America that I sought was nothing but a shadow - an echo - a chimera of lunatics and crazy immigrants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我觉得我所寻求的美国只不过是一个影子--一个回声--一个疯子和疯狂移民的嵌合体

vocabulary.definition: n. 上级, 上司, 大人物
vocabulary.context: With a lot of polite words the head lady of the Women's Association introduced a higher-up that looked like the king of kings of business.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妇联会长大小姐客套了一番，介绍了一位看起来像是商王之王的高层

vocabulary.definition: n. 零售冰的人, 制冰的人
vocabulary.context: There was such a freshness in my brains and such a willingness in my heart I could go on and on - not only with the work of the house, but work with my head - learning new words from the children, the grocer, the butcher, the iceman.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的大脑如此清新，我的内心如此愿意继续下去--不仅是家里的工作，而且是用我的头脑--从孩子们、杂货商、屠夫、制冰人那里学习新单词

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非常低的, 卑微的, 下等的；n. 实情, 真相, 内幕
vocabulary.context: I shrank back into myself like a low-down bargainer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我像一个卑鄙的讨价还价者一样缩回自己

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使丧失生命, 忘却(自己过去的经历), 清除(以往过失/丑行)的痕迹
vocabulary.context: My young, strong body, my heart and soul pregnant with the unlived lives of generations clamoring for expression.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我年轻、强壮的身体，我的心灵和灵魂，孕育着几代人渴望表达的未曾经历过的生命

vocabulary.definition: n. 确实, 踏实, 安全
vocabulary.context: Never before in my life did I ever see a man with such a sureness in his step, such power in his face, such friendly positiveness in his eye as when he smiled upon us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我一生中从来没有见过一个人，他的脚步如此坚定，他的脸上充满力量，他的眼神如此友好，积极，就像他对我们微笑时一样。 【07】从来不曾津津乐道仙力

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反刍类的, 沉思的, 默想的；n. 反刍动物
vocabulary.context: Fermentation in the guts of ruminant livestock - mostly cows - releases this gas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 反刍牲畜（主要是牛）肠道内的发酵会释放这种气体

vocabulary.definition: n. 饲育场
vocabulary.context: Finally, Nierenberg notes, even for meat, "not all meat is created equal." Some farmers pen cattle in feedlots to fatten them quickly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，尼伦伯格指出，即使对于肉类来说，"并非所有肉类都是生来平等的"。一些农民将牛圈在饲养场中以使其快速育肥

vocabulary.definition: n. 克, 绿豆, 鹰嘴豆；[医] 克
vocabulary.context: The diet of someone whose meals included an average of 50 to 99 grams (1.8 to 3.5 ounces) of meat each day would be responsible for the daily release of 5.6 kilograms (12.4 pounds) of CO 2 equivalents, according to the new analysis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据新的分析，如果一个人每天的膳食平均包含 50 至 99 克（1.8 至 3.5 盎司）肉类，那么他的饮食将导致每天释放 5.6 公斤（12.4 磅）CO 2 当量

vocabulary.definition: adj. 气候的
vocabulary.context: Scarborough's team presented its findings in the July issue of Climatic Change.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯卡伯勒的团队在《气候变化》七月号上发表了其研究结果

vocabulary.definition: adj. 氮的, 含氮的, 硝石的；[化] 亚硝的
vocabulary.context: And the scientists calculated the nitrous oxide released during the plowing and fertilizing of crop fields.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家们计算了农田耕作和施肥过程中释放的一氧化二氮

vocabulary.definition: v. bl. 击落
vocabulary.context: That means they downed only plant-based foods with the exceptions of possibly eggs, fish or milk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着他们只吃植物性食物，鸡蛋、鱼或牛奶除外

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有力的, 有说服力的, 有效的；[医] 有力的, 有性交能力的
vocabulary.context: As such, they are more potent, molecule for molecule, in warming Earth's atmosphere.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，它们在使地球大气变暖方面更有效

vocabulary.definition: n. 推进, 吹捧；v.t. 推进, 提高, 宣扬, 促进
vocabulary.context: It also includes the fertilizer and chemicals that boost plant growth and fight pests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它还包括促进植物生长和防治害虫的肥料和化学品

vocabulary.definition: n. 短跑选手
